translations.chinese: 呂太后者，高祖微時妃也，生孝惠帝、女魯元太后。
translations.literal: Empress Dowager Lü was Gaozu's consort during his humble times. She gave birth to Emperor Xiaohui and the female Empress Dowager Lu Yuan.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Dowager Lü was Gaozu's consort during his humble times. She gave birth to Emperor Xiaohui and Empress Dowager Lu Yuan.

context.next: 及高祖為漢王，得定陶戚姬，愛幸，生趙隱王如意。

translations.chinese: 及高祖為漢王，得定陶戚姬，愛幸，生趙隱王如意。
translations.literal: When Gaozu became Han King, he obtained Concubine Qi from Dingtao. He loved and favored her. She gave birth to King Yin of Zhao, Ruyi.
translations.idiomatic: When Gaozu became the King of Han, he obtained Concubine Qi from Dingtao. He loved and favored her. She gave birth to King Yin of Zhao, Ruyi.

context.previous: 呂太后者，高祖微時妃也，生孝惠帝、女魯元太后。
context.next: 孝惠為人仁弱，高祖以為不類我，常欲廢太子，立戚姬子如意，如意類我。

translations.chinese: 孝惠為人仁弱，高祖以為不類我，常欲廢太子，立戚姬子如意，如意類我。
translations.literal: Emperor Xiaohui was benevolent and weak as a person. Gaozu considered him unlike himself. He often wished to abolish the crown prince and establish Concubine Qi's son Ruyi, for Ruyi was like him.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor Xiaohui was benevolent and weak. Gaozu considered him unlike himself. He often wished to abolish the crown prince and establish Concubine Qi's son Ruyi, for Ruyi was like him.

context.previous: 及高祖為漢王，得定陶戚姬，愛幸，生趙隱王如意。
context.next: 戚姬幸，常從上之關東，日夜啼泣，欲立其子代太子。

translations.chinese: 戚姬幸，常從上之關東，日夜啼泣，欲立其子代太子。
translations.literal: Concubine Qi was favored. She often followed the emperor to Guandong. Day and night she wept and cried, wishing to establish her son to replace the crown prince.
translations.idiomatic: Concubine Qi was favored. She often followed the emperor to Guandong. She wept day and night, wishing to establish her son to replace the crown prince.

context.previous: 孝惠為人仁弱，高祖以為不類我，常欲廢太子，立戚姬子如意，如意類我。
context.next: 呂后年長，常留守，希見上，益疏。

translations.chinese: 呂后年長，常留守，希見上，益疏。
translations.literal: Empress Lü was older. She often stayed to defend. She rarely saw the emperor. She became increasingly distant.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was older. She often stayed to defend. She rarely saw the emperor. She became increasingly distant.

context.previous: 戚姬幸，常從上之關東，日夜啼泣，欲立其子代太子。
context.next: 如意立為趙王後，幾代太子者數矣，賴大臣爭之，及留侯策，太子得毋廢。

translations.chinese: 如意立為趙王後，幾代太子者數矣，賴大臣爭之，及留侯策，太子得毋廢。
translations.literal: After Ruyi was established as King of Zhao, he nearly replaced the crown prince several times. It relied on ministers contending against it, and Marquis Liu's strategy, that the crown prince was not abolished.
translations.idiomatic: After Ruyi was established as the King of Zhao, he nearly replaced the crown prince several times. It relied on ministers contending against it, and Marquis Liu's strategy, that the crown prince was not abolished.

context.previous: 呂后年長，常留守，希見上，益疏。

translations.chinese: 呂后為人剛毅，佐高祖定天下，所誅大臣多呂后力。
translations.literal: Empress Lü was firm and resolute as a person. She assisted Gaozu in pacifying the world. The ministers who were executed were mostly through Empress Lü's strength.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was firm and resolute. She assisted Gaozu in pacifying the world. The ministers who were executed were mostly through Empress Lü's strength.

context.next: 呂后兄二人，皆為將。

translations.chinese: 呂后兄二人，皆為將。
translations.literal: Empress Lü had two elder brothers. They were both generals.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü had two elder brothers. They were both generals.

context.previous: 呂后為人剛毅，佐高祖定天下，所誅大臣多呂后力。
context.next: 長兄周呂侯死事，封其子呂臺為酈侯，子產為交侯；

translations.chinese: 長兄周呂侯死事，封其子呂臺為酈侯，子產為交侯；
translations.literal: Elder brother Zhou Lu Hou died affairs, enfeoffed his son Lu Tai as Li Hou, Zi Chan as Jiao Hou;
translations.idiomatic: The elder brother Lord Zhou Lü died in service. His son Lü Tai was enfeoffed as Lord Li, and Zichan as Lord Jiao;

context.previous: 呂后兄二人，皆為將。
context.next: 次兄呂釋之為建成侯。

translations.chinese: 次兄呂釋之為建成侯。
translations.literal: The second brother Lü Shizhi was Lord Jiancheng.
translations.idiomatic: The second brother Lü Shizhi was Lord Jiancheng.

translations.chinese: 高祖十二年四月甲辰，崩長樂宮，太子襲號為帝。
translations.literal: In Gaozu's twelfth year, fourth month, Jia Chen day, he passed away in Changlegong palace. The crown prince inherited the title as emperor.
translations.idiomatic: In Gaozu's twelfth year, fourth month, Jia Chen day, he passed away in Changlegong palace. The crown prince inherited the title as emperor.

context.next: 是時高祖八子：長男肥，孝惠兄也，異母，肥為齊王；

translations.chinese: 是時高祖八子：長男肥，孝惠兄也，異母，肥為齊王；
translations.literal: At this time Gao Zu eight sons: eldest son Fei, Xiao Hui elder brother, different mother, Fei was Qi Wang;
translations.idiomatic: At this time Gaozu had eight sons: the eldest son Fei, who was Emperor Xiaohui's elder brother from a different mother, Fei was the King of Qi;

context.next: 餘皆孝惠弟，戚姬子如意為趙王，薄夫人子恒為代王，諸姬子子恢為梁王，子友為淮陽王，子長為淮南王，子建為燕王。

translations.chinese: 餘皆孝惠弟，戚姬子如意為趙王，薄夫人子恒為代王，諸姬子子恢為梁王，子友為淮陽王，子長為淮南王，子建為燕王。
translations.literal: The remainder were all Emperor Xiaohui's younger brothers. Concubine Qi's son Ruyi was King of Zhao. Lady Bo's son Heng was King of Dai. The various concubines' sons: Zihui was King of Liang, Ziyou was King of Huaiyang, Zichang was King of Huainan, Zijian was King of Yan.
translations.idiomatic: The remainder were all Emperor Xiaohui's younger brothers. Concubine Qi's son Ruyi was the King of Zhao. Lady Bo's son Heng was the King of Dai. The various concubines' sons: Zihui was the King of Liang, Ziyou was the King of Huaiyang, Zichang was the King of Huainan, Zijian was the King of Yan.

translations.chinese: 高祖弟交為楚王，兄子濞為吳王。
translations.literal: Gaozu's younger brother Jiao was King of Chu. His elder brother's son Pi was King of Wu.
translations.idiomatic: Gaozu's younger brother Jiao was the King of Chu. His elder brother's son Pi was the King of Wu.

translations.chinese: 非劉氏功臣番君吳芮子臣為長沙王。
translations.literal: The non-Liu clan meritorious minister Lord Fan's Wu Rui's son Chen was King of Changsha.
translations.idiomatic: The non-Liu clan meritorious minister Lord Fan's Wu Rui's son Chen was the King of Changsha.

translations.chinese: 呂后最怨戚夫人及其子趙王，乃令永巷囚戚夫人，而召趙王。
translations.literal: Empress Lü most resented Concubine Qi and her son King of Zhao. She then ordered Concubine Qi imprisoned in the Yongxiang, and summoned the King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü most resented Concubine Qi and her son the King of Zhao. She ordered Concubine Qi imprisoned in the Yongxiang, and summoned the the King of Zhao.

translations.chinese: 使者三反，趙相建平侯周昌謂使者曰：「高帝屬臣趙王，趙王年少。
translations.literal: Envoys three times returned, Zhao chancellor Jianping Hou Zhou Chang said to envoys: 'Gao Di entrusted minister Zhao Wang, Zhao Wang young.
translations.idiomatic: The envoys returned three times. The Zhao chancellor Lord Jianping Zhou Chang said to the envoys: 'The High Emperor entrusted the minister with the King of Zhao. the King of Zhao is young.

context.previous: 呂后最怨戚夫人及其子趙王，乃令永巷囚戚夫人，而召趙王。
context.next: 竊聞太后怨戚夫人，欲召趙王并誅之，臣不敢遣王。

translations.chinese: 竊聞太后怨戚夫人，欲召趙王并誅之，臣不敢遣王。
translations.literal: I have secretly heard that the Empress Dowager resents Concubine Qi. She wishes to summon King of Zhao and execute them both. I dare not send the king.
translations.idiomatic: I have heard that the Empress Dowager resents Concubine Qi. She wishes to summon the King of Zhao and execute them both. I dare not send the king.

context.previous: 使者三反，趙相建平侯周昌謂使者曰：「高帝屬臣趙王，趙王年少。

translations.chinese: 王且亦病，不能奉詔。」
translations.literal: Wang moreover also ill, cannot obey decree.'
translations.idiomatic: Wang also ill, cannot obey decree.'

context.previous: 竊聞太后怨戚夫人，欲召趙王并誅之，臣不敢遣王。

translations.chinese: 呂后大怒，乃使人召趙相。
translations.literal: Empress Lü was greatly angered. She then sent people to summon the Zhao chancellor.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was greatly angered. She sent people to summon the Zhao chancellor.

context.previous: 王且亦病，不能奉詔。」
context.next: 趙相徵至長安，乃使人復召趙王。

translations.literal: Zhao chancellor summoned to Chang'an, then made people again summon Zhao Wang.
translations.idiomatic: The Zhao chancellor was summoned to Chang'an. She sent people to summon the King of Zhao again.

context.previous: 呂后大怒，乃使人召趙相。

translations.chinese: 王來，未到。
translations.literal: The king came, but had not yet arrived.
translations.idiomatic: The king came, but had not yet arrived.

context.next: 孝惠帝慈仁，知太后怒，自迎趙王霸上，與入宮，自挾與趙王起居飲食。

translations.chinese: 孝惠帝慈仁，知太后怒，自迎趙王霸上，與入宮，自挾與趙王起居飲食。
translations.literal: Emperor Xiaohui was compassionate and benevolent. He knew of the Empress Dowager's anger. He personally welcomed King of Zhao at Baxiang. He entered the palace with him. He personally embraced him and shared in his rising, residing, eating, and drinking.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor Xiaohui was compassionate and benevolent. He knew of the Empress Dowager's anger. He personally welcomed the King of Zhao at Baxiang. He entered the palace with him. He personally embraced him and shared in his rising, residing, eating, and drinking.

translations.literal: The Empress Dowager wished to kill him, but could not find an opportunity.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager wished to kill him, but could not find an opportunity.

context.previous: 孝惠帝慈仁，知太后怒，自迎趙王霸上，與入宮，自挾與趙王起居飲食。

translations.literal: In Emperor Xiaohui's first year, twelfth month, the emperor went out hunting in the morning.
translations.idiomatic: In Emperor Xiaohui's first year, twelfth month, the emperor went out hunting in the morning.

translations.literal: King of Zhao was young. He could not rise early.
translations.idiomatic: the King of Zhao was young. He could not rise early.

context.previous: 孝惠元年十二月，帝晨出射。

translations.chinese: 太后聞其獨居，使人持酖飲之。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager heard that he was residing alone. She sent people to give him poisoned wine.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager heard that he was residing alone. She sent people to give him poisoned wine.

context.previous: 趙王少，不能蚤起。

translations.idiomatic: At dawn, Emperor Xiaohui returned. the King of Zhao was already dead.

translations.literal: Thereupon King You of Huaiyang was moved to be King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: Thereupon King You of Huaiyang was moved to be the King of Zhao.

translations.idiomatic: In summer, by decree Lord Li's father was granted the posthumous title Lord Ling Wu.

translations.literal: Empress dowager then cut off Qi Furen hands feet, removed eyes, cauterized ears, gave mute medicine, made reside latrine middle, named 'human pig'.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager then cut off Concubine Qi's hands and feet, removed her eyes, cauterized her ears, gave her a mute medicine, and made her reside in the latrine. She named her 'human pig'.

translations.literal: Emperor Xiaohui saw and asked. He then knew it was Concubine Qi. He then greatly cried. Because of illness, for over a year he could not rise.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor Xiaohui saw and asked. He knew it was Concubine Qi. He greatly cried. Because of illness, for over a year he could not rise.

translations.literal: Sent people petition empress dowager said: 'This not human conduct.
translations.idiomatic: He sent people to petition the Empress Dowager saying: 'This is not human conduct.

context.previous: 孝惠見，問，乃知其戚夫人，乃大哭，因病，歲餘不能起。
context.next: 臣為太后子，終不能治天下。」

translations.literal: Minister as empress dowager son, finally cannot govern world.'
translations.idiomatic: I am the Empress Dowager's son. I can finally not govern the world.'

translations.chinese: 孝惠以此日飲為淫樂，不聽政，故有病也。
translations.literal: Emperor Xiaohui because of this daily took drinking as lewd pleasure. He did not listen to government. Therefore he had illness.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor Xiaohui because of this daily took drinking as lewd pleasure. He did not listen to government. Therefore he had illness.

translations.chinese: 二年，楚元王、齊悼惠王皆來朝。
translations.literal: In the second year, King Yuan of Chu and King Dao Hui of Qi both came to court.
translations.idiomatic: In the second year, King Yuan of Chu and King Dao Hui of Qi both came to court.

context.next: 十月，孝惠與齊王燕飲太后前，孝惠以為齊王兄，置上坐，如家人之禮。

translations.idiomatic: the King of Qi rose. Emperor Xiaohui also rose. He took the goblet wishing to together make a longevity toast.

translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager then feared. She personally rose and poured Emperor Xiaohui's goblet.

translations.idiomatic: the King of Qi wondered at it. Because he dared not drink, he feigned being drunk and left.

translations.literal: Now the king has over seventy cities, but the princess only eats several cities.
translations.idiomatic: Now the king has over seventy cities, but the princess only eats several cities.

translations.chinese: 王誠以一郡上太后，為公主湯沐邑，太后必喜，王必無憂。」
translations.literal: Wang sincerely with one commandery offer empress dowager, as princess bathing city, empress dowager certainly happy, wang certainly without worry.'
translations.idiomatic: If the king sincerely offers one commandery to the Empress Dowager as the princess's bathing city, the Empress Dowager will certainly be happy, and The king will certainly have no worries.'

context.previous: 今王有七十餘城，而公主乃食數城。
context.next: 於是齊王乃上城陽之郡，尊公主為王太后。

translations.chinese: 於是齊王乃上城陽之郡，尊公主為王太后。
translations.literal: Thereupon King of Qi then offered the commandery of Chengyang. He honored the princess as Queen Empress Dowager.
translations.idiomatic: Thereupon the King of Qi then offered the commandery of Chengyang. He honored the princess as Queen Empress Dowager.

context.previous: 王誠以一郡上太后，為公主湯沐邑，太后必喜，王必無憂。」
context.next: 呂后喜，許之。

translations.chinese: 呂后喜，許之。
translations.literal: Empress Lü was happy. She permitted it.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was happy. She permitted it.

context.previous: 於是齊王乃上城陽之郡，尊公主為王太后。
context.next: 乃置酒齊邸，樂飲，罷，歸齊王。

translations.chinese: 乃置酒齊邸，樂飲，罷，歸齊王。
translations.literal: She then set wine in the Qi residence. Joyful drinking. Finished. She returned King of Qi.
translations.idiomatic: She set wine in the Qi residence. Joyful drinking. Finished. She returned the King of Qi.

context.previous: 呂后喜，許之。
context.next: 三年，方筑長安城，四年就半，五年六年城就。

translations.chinese: 三年，方筑長安城，四年就半，五年六年城就。
translations.literal: Third year, just building Chang'an city, fourth year completed half, fifth sixth year city completed.
translations.idiomatic: In the third year, they were just building Chang'an city. In the fourth year it was half completed. In the fifth and sixth years the city was completed.

context.previous: 乃置酒齊邸，樂飲，罷，歸齊王。
context.next: 諸侯來會。

translations.chinese: 諸侯來會。
translations.literal: The various marquises came to the assembly.
translations.idiomatic: The various marquises came to the assembly.

context.previous: 三年，方筑長安城，四年就半，五年六年城就。
context.next: 十月朝賀。

translations.chinese: 十月朝賀。
translations.literal: In the tenth month they had court congratulations.
translations.idiomatic: In the tenth month they had court congratulations.

context.previous: 諸侯來會。

translations.chinese: 七年秋八月戊寅，孝惠帝崩。
translations.literal: In the seventh year, autumn, eighth month, Wu Yin day, Emperor Xiaohui passed.
translations.idiomatic: In the seventh year, autumn, eighth month, Wu Yin day, Emperor Xiaohui passed.

context.next: 發喪，太后哭，泣不下。

translations.chinese: 發喪，太后哭，泣不下。
translations.literal: The mourning was issued. The Empress Dowager cried. Tears did not descend.
translations.idiomatic: The mourning was issued, and The Empress Dowager cried. Tears did not descend.

context.previous: 七年秋八月戊寅，孝惠帝崩。
context.next: 留侯子張辟彊為侍中，年十五，謂丞相曰：「太后獨有孝惠，今崩，哭不悲，君知其解乎？」

translations.chinese: 留侯子張辟彊為侍中，年十五，謂丞相曰：「太后獨有孝惠，今崩，哭不悲，君知其解乎？」
translations.literal: Liu Hou son Zhang Pi Qiang was attendant middle, age fifteen, said to chancellor: 'Empress dowager alone has Xiao Hui, now passed, cries not sorrowful, lord knows its explanation?'
translations.idiomatic: Marquis Liu's son Zhang Pijiang was Attendant in the Palace, age fifteen. He said to the chancellor: 'The Empress Dowager alone had Emperor Xiaohui. Now he has passed. Her cries are not sorrowful. Does my lord know the explanation?'

context.previous: 發喪，太后哭，泣不下。
context.next: 丞相曰：「何解？」

translations.chinese: 丞相曰：「何解？」
translations.literal: Chancellor said: 'What explanation?'
translations.idiomatic: The chancellor said: 'What explanation?'

context.previous: 留侯子張辟彊為侍中，年十五，謂丞相曰：「太后獨有孝惠，今崩，哭不悲，君知其解乎？」
context.next: 辟彊曰：「帝毋壯子，太后畏君等。

translations.chinese: 辟彊曰：「帝毋壯子，太后畏君等。
translations.literal: Pi Qiang said: 'Emperor no adult sons, empress dowager fears lords etc.
translations.idiomatic: Pijiang said: 'The emperor has no adult sons, and The Empress Dowager fears you lords.'

context.previous: 丞相曰：「何解？」
context.next: 君今請拜呂臺、呂產、呂祿為將，將兵居南北軍，及諸呂皆入宮，居中用事，如此則太后心安，君等幸得脫禍矣。」

translations.chinese: 君今請拜呂臺、呂產、呂祿為將，將兵居南北軍，及諸呂皆入宮，居中用事，如此則太后心安，君等幸得脫禍矣。」
translations.literal: Lord now please appoint Lu Tai, Lu Chan, Lu Lu as generals, lead troops reside north south armies, and various Lu all enter palace, reside center use affairs, thus then empress dowager heart peaceful, lords etc. fortunate able escape calamity.'
translations.idiomatic: My lord should now request to appoint Lü Tai, Lü Chan, Lü Lu as generals. Have them lead troops and reside in the northern and southern armies. And have all the various Lü enter the palace and reside in the center managing affairs. Thus the Empress Dowager's heart will be peaceful. You lords will fortunately be able to escape calamity.'

context.previous: 辟彊曰：「帝毋壯子，太后畏君等。
context.next: 丞相乃如辟彊計。

translations.chinese: 丞相乃如辟彊計。
translations.literal: The chancellor then followed Pijiang's plan.
translations.idiomatic: The chancellor then followed Pijiang's plan.

context.previous: 君今請拜呂臺、呂產、呂祿為將，將兵居南北軍，及諸呂皆入宮，居中用事，如此則太后心安，君等幸得脫禍矣。」
context.next: 太后說，其哭乃哀。

translations.chinese: 太后說，其哭乃哀。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager was pleased. Her cries then became sorrowful.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager was pleased. Her cries then became sorrowful.

context.previous: 丞相乃如辟彊計。
context.next: 呂氏權由此起。

translations.chinese: 呂氏權由此起。
translations.literal: The Lü clan's authority arose from this.
translations.idiomatic: The Lü clan's authority arose from this.

context.previous: 太后說，其哭乃哀。
context.next: 乃大赦天下。

translations.chinese: 乃大赦天下。
translations.literal: She then granted a great amnesty to the world.
translations.idiomatic: She granted a great amnesty to the world.

context.previous: 呂氏權由此起。
context.next: 九月辛丑，葬。

translations.chinese: 九月辛丑，葬。
translations.literal: In the ninth month, Xin Chou day, burial took place.
translations.idiomatic: In the ninth month, Xin Chou day, burial took place.

context.previous: 乃大赦天下。
context.next: 太子即位為帝，謁高廟。

translations.chinese: 太子即位為帝，謁高廟。
translations.literal: The crown prince ascended the position as emperor. He announced at Gao temple.
translations.idiomatic: The crown prince ascended the position as emperor. He announced at Gao temple.

context.previous: 九月辛丑，葬。
context.next: 元年，號令一出太后。

translations.chinese: 元年，號令一出太后。
translations.literal: In the first year, all orders issued from the Empress Dowager.
translations.idiomatic: In the first year, all orders issued from the Empress Dowager.

context.previous: 太子即位為帝，謁高廟。

translations.chinese: 太后稱制，議欲立諸呂為王，問右丞相王陵。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager claimed regency. She discussed wishing to establish the various Lü as kings. She asked Right Chancellor Wang Ling.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager claimed regency. She discussed wishing to establish the various Lü as kings. She asked Right Chancellor Wang Ling.

context.next: 王陵曰：「高帝刑白馬盟曰『非劉氏而王，天下共擊之』。

translations.chinese: 王陵曰：「高帝刑白馬盟曰『非劉氏而王，天下共擊之』。
translations.literal: Wang Ling said: 'Gao Di executed white horse oath said 'not Liu clan and wang, world together strike it'.
translations.idiomatic: Wang Ling said: 'The High Emperor executed the white horse oath saying 'if not Liu clan and become king, the world together shall strike it'.'

context.previous: 太后稱制，議欲立諸呂為王，問右丞相王陵。
context.next: 今王呂氏，非約也。」

translations.chinese: 今王呂氏，非約也。」
translations.literal: Now wang Lu clan, not covenant.'
translations.idiomatic: Now to make Lü clan kings is not according to the covenant.'

context.previous: 王陵曰：「高帝刑白馬盟曰『非劉氏而王，天下共擊之』。
context.next: 太后不說。

translations.chinese: 太后不說。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager was not pleased.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was not pleased.

context.previous: 今王呂氏，非約也。」
context.next: 問左丞相陳平、絳侯周勃。

translations.chinese: 問左丞相陳平、絳侯周勃。
translations.literal: She asked Left Chancellor Chen Ping and Marquis Jiang Zhou Bo.
translations.idiomatic: She consulted Left Chancellor Chen Ping and Marquis Jiang Zhou Bo.

context.previous: 太后不說。
context.next: 勃等對曰：「高帝定天下，王子弟，今太后稱制，王昆弟諸呂，無所不可。」

translations.chinese: 勃等對曰：「高帝定天下，王子弟，今太后稱制，王昆弟諸呂，無所不可。」
translations.literal: Bo etc. answered: 'Gao Di pacified world, wang sons younger brothers, now empress dowager claims regency, wang brothers various Lu, nothing unacceptable.'
translations.idiomatic: Zhou Bo and the others answered: 'The High Emperor pacified the world and made his sons and younger brothers kings. Now the Empress Dowager claims regency. To make her brothers the various Lü kings is nothing unacceptable.'

context.previous: 問左丞相陳平、絳侯周勃。
context.next: 太后喜，罷朝。

translations.chinese: 太后喜，罷朝。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager was happy. She dismissed court.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was happy. She dismissed court.

context.previous: 勃等對曰：「高帝定天下，王子弟，今太后稱制，王昆弟諸呂，無所不可。」
context.next: 王陵讓陳平、絳侯曰：「始與高帝啑血盟，諸君不在邪？

translations.chinese: 王陵讓陳平、絳侯曰：「始與高帝啑血盟，諸君不在邪？
translations.literal: Wang Ling rebuked Chen Ping, Jiang Hou said: 'Beginning with Gao Di smeared blood oath, various lords not present evil?
translations.idiomatic: Wang Ling rebuked Chen Ping and Marquis Jiang saying: 'At the beginning when we smeared blood and made oath with the High Emperor, were you various lords not present?'

context.previous: 太后喜，罷朝。
context.next: 今高帝崩，太后女主，欲王呂氏，諸君從欲阿意背約，何面目見高帝地下？」

translations.chinese: 今高帝崩，太后女主，欲王呂氏，諸君從欲阿意背約，何面目見高帝地下？」
translations.literal: Now Gao Di passed, empress dowager female ruler, wishes wang Lu clan, various lords follow desire flatter intent break covenant, what face see Gao Di underground?'
translations.idiomatic: Now the High Emperor has passed, and The Empress Dowager is female ruler. She wishes to make Lü clan kings. You various lords follow her desires, flatter her intent, break the covenant. With what face will you see the High Emperor underground?'

context.previous: 王陵讓陳平、絳侯曰：「始與高帝啑血盟，諸君不在邪？
context.next: 陳平、絳侯曰：「於今面折廷爭，臣不如君；

translations.chinese: 陳平、絳侯曰：「於今面折廷爭，臣不如君；
translations.literal: Chen Ping, Jiang Hou said: 'At present face rebuke court contend, minister not as good as lord;
translations.idiomatic: Chen Ping and Marquis Jiang said: 'At present, in face-to-face rebuke and court contention, this minister is not as good as my lord.'

context.previous: 今高帝崩，太后女主，欲王呂氏，諸君從欲阿意背約，何面目見高帝地下？」
context.next: 夫全社稷，定劉氏之後，君亦不如臣。」

translations.chinese: 夫全社稷，定劉氏之後，君亦不如臣。」
translations.literal: Indeed preserve altar grain, stabilize Liu clan posterity, lord also not as good as minister.'
translations.idiomatic: Indeed, in preserving the state and stabilizing the Liu clan's posterity, my lord is also not as good as this minister.'

context.previous: 陳平、絳侯曰：「於今面折廷爭，臣不如君；
context.next: 王陵無以應之。

translations.chinese: 王陵無以應之。
translations.literal: Wang Ling had nothing with which to respond.
translations.idiomatic: Wang Ling was speechless.

context.previous: 夫全社稷，定劉氏之後，君亦不如臣。」
context.next: 十一月，太后欲廢王陵，乃拜為帝太傅，奪之相權。

translations.chinese: 十一月，太后欲廢王陵，乃拜為帝太傅，奪之相權。
translations.literal: In the eleventh month, the Empress Dowager wished to abolish Wang Ling. She then appointed him as the emperor's grand tutor. She seized his chancellor authority.
translations.idiomatic: In the eleventh month, the Empress Dowager wished to abolish Wang Ling. She appointed him as the emperor's grand tutor and stripped him of his chancellor's power.

context.previous: 王陵無以應之。
context.next: 王陵遂病免歸。

translations.chinese: 王陵遂病免歸。
translations.literal: Wang Ling then pleaded illness and resigned to return home.
translations.idiomatic: Wang Ling then feigned illness and resigned.

context.previous: 十一月，太后欲廢王陵，乃拜為帝太傅，奪之相權。
context.next: 乃以左丞相平為右丞相，以辟陽侯審食其為左丞相。

translations.chinese: 乃以左丞相平為右丞相，以辟陽侯審食其為左丞相。
translations.literal: She then made Left Chancellor Ping the Right Chancellor. She made Marquis Piyang Shen Shiqi the Left Chancellor.
translations.idiomatic: She appointed Left Chancellor Ping the Right Chancellor. She made Marquis Piyang Shen Shiqi the Left Chancellor.

context.previous: 王陵遂病免歸。
context.next: 左丞相不治事，令監宮中，如郎中令。

translations.chinese: 左丞相不治事，令監宮中，如郎中令。
translations.literal: The Left Chancellor did not manage affairs. He was ordered to oversee the palace interior, like the Gentleman-in-Attendance.
translations.idiomatic: The Left Chancellor did not manage affairs. He was ordered to oversee the palace interior, like the Gentleman-in-Attendance.

context.previous: 乃以左丞相平為右丞相，以辟陽侯審食其為左丞相。
context.next: 食其故得幸太后，常用事，公卿皆因而決事。

translations.chinese: 食其故得幸太后，常用事，公卿皆因而決事。
translations.literal: Shen Shiqi had formerly obtained the Empress Dowager's favor. He often managed affairs. The dukes and ministers all decided affairs through him.
translations.idiomatic: Shen Shiqi had formerly obtained the Empress Dowager's favor. He often managed affairs. The dukes and ministers all decided affairs through him.

context.previous: 左丞相不治事，令監宮中，如郎中令。
context.next: 乃追尊酈侯父為悼武王，欲以王諸呂為漸。

translations.chinese: 乃追尊酈侯父為悼武王，欲以王諸呂為漸。
translations.literal: She then posthumously honored Lord Li's father as King Dao Wu. She wished to use this as a gradual approach to making the various Lü kings.
translations.idiomatic: Then she posthumously honored Lord Li's father as King Dao Wu. She wished to use this as a gradual approach to making the various Lü kings.

context.previous: 食其故得幸太后，常用事，公卿皆因而決事。

translations.chinese: 四月，太后欲侯諸呂，乃先封高祖之功臣郎中令無擇為博城侯。
translations.literal: In the fourth month, the Empress Dowager wished to make the various Lü marquises. She then first enfeoffed the High Emperor's meritorious minister Gentleman-in-Attendance Wu Ze as Lord Bo Cheng.
translations.idiomatic: In the fourth month, the Empress Dowager wished to make the various Lü marquises. Then she first enfeoffed the High Emperor's meritorious minister Gentleman-in-Attendance Wu Ze as Lord Bo Cheng.

context.next: 魯元公主薨，賜謚為魯元太后。

translations.chinese: 魯元公主薨，賜謚為魯元太后。
translations.literal: Princess Lu Yuan passed. She was granted the posthumous title Empress Dowager Lu Yuan.
translations.idiomatic: Princess Lu Yuan passed. She was granted the posthumous title Empress Dowager Lu Yuan.

context.previous: 四月，太后欲侯諸呂，乃先封高祖之功臣郎中令無擇為博城侯。
context.next: 子偃為魯王。

translations.chinese: 子偃為魯王。
translations.literal: Her son Yan became King of Lu.
translations.idiomatic: Her son Yan became the King of Lu.

context.previous: 魯元公主薨，賜謚為魯元太后。
context.next: 魯王父，宣平侯張敖也。

translations.chinese: 魯王父，宣平侯張敖也。
translations.literal: The King of Lu's father was Marquis Xuanping Zhang Ao.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Lu's father was Marquis Xuanping Zhang Ao.

context.previous: 子偃為魯王。
context.next: 封齊悼惠王子章為朱虛侯，以呂祿女妻之。

translations.chinese: 封齊悼惠王子章為朱虛侯，以呂祿女妻之。
translations.literal: She enfeoffed King Dao Hui of Qi's son Zizhang as Lord Zhu Xu. She married Lü Lu's daughter to him.
translations.idiomatic: She enfeoffed King Dao Hui of Qi's son Zizhang as Lord Zhu Xu. She married Lü Lu's daughter to him.

context.previous: 魯王父，宣平侯張敖也。
context.next: 齊丞相壽為平定侯。

translations.chinese: 齊丞相壽為平定侯。
translations.literal: The Qi chancellor Shou became Lord Ping Ding.
translations.idiomatic: The Qi chancellor Shou became Lord Ping Ding.

context.previous: 封齊悼惠王子章為朱虛侯，以呂祿女妻之。
context.next: 少府延為梧侯。

translations.chinese: 少府延為梧侯。
translations.literal: The lesser treasurer Yan became Lord Wu.
translations.idiomatic: The lesser treasurer Yan became Lord Wu.

context.previous: 齊丞相壽為平定侯。
context.next: 乃封呂種為沛侯，呂平為扶柳侯，張買為南宮侯。

translations.chinese: 乃封呂種為沛侯，呂平為扶柳侯，張買為南宮侯。
translations.literal: She then enfeoffed Lü Zhong as Lord Pei, Lü Ping as Lord Fu Liu, Zhang Mai as Lord Nan Gong.
translations.idiomatic: Then she enfeoffed Lü Zhong as Lord Pei, Lü Ping as Lord Fu Liu, Zhang Mai as Lord Nan Gong.

context.previous: 少府延為梧侯。

translations.chinese: 太后欲王呂氏，先立孝惠後宮子彊為淮陽王，子不疑為常山王，子山為襄城侯，子朝為軹侯，子武為壺關侯。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager wished to make Lü clan kings. She first established Emperor Xiaohui's rear palace son Qiang as King of Huaiyang, son Buyi as King of Changshan, son Shan as Lord Xiangcheng, son Zhao as Lord Zhi, son Wu as Lord Huguan.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü wished to make Lü clan kings. She first established Emperor Xiaohui's rear palace son Qiang as the King of Huaiyang, son Buyi as the King of Changshan, son Shan as Lord Xiangcheng, son Zhao as Lord Zhi, son Wu as Lord Huguan.

context.next: 太后風大臣，大臣請立酈侯呂臺為呂王，太后許之。

translations.chinese: 太后風大臣，大臣請立酈侯呂臺為呂王，太后許之。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager hinted to the ministers. The ministers requested to establish Lord Li Lü Tai as King Lü. The Empress Dowager permitted it.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü hinted to the ministers. The ministers requested to establish Lord Li Lü Tai as King Lü. Empress Lü permitted it.

context.previous: 太后欲王呂氏，先立孝惠後宮子彊為淮陽王，子不疑為常山王，子山為襄城侯，子朝為軹侯，子武為壺關侯。
context.next: 建成康侯釋之卒，嗣子有罪，廢，立其弟呂祿為胡陵侯，續康侯後。

translations.chinese: 建成康侯釋之卒，嗣子有罪，廢，立其弟呂祿為胡陵侯，續康侯後。
translations.literal: Lord Kang of Jiancheng Lü Shizhi passed. His heir son had crime. He was abolished. She established his younger brother Lü Lu as Lord Hu Ling to continue the Lord Kang's posterity.
translations.idiomatic: Lord Kang of Jiancheng Lü Shizhi passed. His heir son had crime. He was abolished. She established his younger brother Lü Lu as Lord Hu Ling to continue the Lord Kang's posterity.

context.previous: 太后風大臣，大臣請立酈侯呂臺為呂王，太后許之。
context.next: 二年，常山王薨，以其弟襄城侯山為常山王，更名義。

translations.chinese: 二年，常山王薨，以其弟襄城侯山為常山王，更名義。
translations.literal: In the second year, King of Changshan passed. She made his younger brother Lord Xiangcheng Shan the King of Changshan. She changed his name to Yi.
translations.idiomatic: In the second year, the King of Changshan passed. She made his younger brother Lord Xiangcheng Shan the the King of Changshan. She changed his name to Yi.

context.previous: 建成康侯釋之卒，嗣子有罪，廢，立其弟呂祿為胡陵侯，續康侯後。
context.next: 十一月，呂王臺薨，謚為肅王，太子嘉代立為王。

translations.chinese: 十一月，呂王臺薨，謚為肅王，太子嘉代立為王。
translations.literal: In the eleventh month, King Lü Tai passed. He was given the posthumous title King Su. Crown prince Jia was established to substitute as king.
translations.idiomatic: In the eleventh month, King Lü Tai passed. He was given the posthumous title King Su. Crown prince Jia was established to substitute as king.

context.previous: 二年，常山王薨，以其弟襄城侯山為常山王，更名義。
context.next: 三年，無事。

translations.chinese: 三年，無事。
translations.literal: In the third year, there were no affairs.
translations.idiomatic: In the third year, there were no affairs.

context.previous: 十一月，呂王臺薨，謚為肅王，太子嘉代立為王。
context.next: 四年，封呂媭為臨光侯，呂他為俞侯，呂更始為贅其侯，呂忿為呂城侯，及諸侯丞相五人。

translations.chinese: 四年，封呂媭為臨光侯，呂他為俞侯，呂更始為贅其侯，呂忿為呂城侯，及諸侯丞相五人。
translations.literal: In the fourth year, she enfeoffed Lü Kui as Lord Lin Guang, Lü Ta as Lord Yu, Lü Gengshi as Lord Zhui Qi, Lü Fen as Lord Lü Cheng, and five chancellors of the various marquises.
translations.idiomatic: In the fourth year, she enfeoffed Lü Kui as Lord Lin Guang, Lü Ta as Lord Yu, Lü Gengshi as Lord Zhui Qi, Lü Fen as Lord Lü Cheng, and five chancellors of the various marquises.

context.previous: 三年，無事。

translations.chinese: 宣平侯女為孝惠皇后時，無子，詳為有身，取美人子名之，殺其母，立所名子為太子。
translations.literal: When the daughter of Marquis Xuanping was Emperor Xiaohui's empress, she had no sons. She feigned pregnancy. She took a beautiful woman's son and named him as her own. She killed the mother. She established the named son as crown prince.
translations.idiomatic: When the daughter of Marquis Xuanping was Emperor Xiaohui's empress, she had no sons. She feigned pregnancy. She took a beautiful woman's son and named him as her own. She killed the mother. She established the named son as crown prince.

context.next: 孝惠崩，太子立為帝。

translations.chinese: 孝惠崩，太子立為帝。
translations.literal: Emperor Xiaohui passed. The crown prince was established as emperor.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor Xiaohui passed. The crown prince was established as emperor.

context.previous: 宣平侯女為孝惠皇后時，無子，詳為有身，取美人子名之，殺其母，立所名子為太子。
context.next: 帝壯，或聞其母死，非真皇后子，乃出言曰：「后安能殺吾母而名我？

translations.chinese: 帝壯，或聞其母死，非真皇后子，乃出言曰：「后安能殺吾母而名我？
translations.literal: Emperor matured, someone heard his mother died, not true empress son, then spoke saying: 'Empress how able kill my mother and name me?
translations.idiomatic: The emperor matured. Someone heard that his mother had died and that he was not the true empress's son. He spoke saying: 'How could the empress kill my mother and name me as her own?

context.previous: 孝惠崩，太子立為帝。
context.next: 我未壯，壯即為變。」

translations.chinese: 我未壯，壯即為變。」
translations.literal: I not yet mature, mature then make change.'
translations.idiomatic: I am not yet mature. When I mature, I will make a change.'

context.previous: 帝壯，或聞其母死，非真皇后子，乃出言曰：「后安能殺吾母而名我？
context.next: 太后聞而患之，恐其為亂，乃幽之永卷中，言帝病甚，左右莫得見。

translations.chinese: 太后聞而患之，恐其為亂，乃幽之永卷中，言帝病甚，左右莫得見。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager heard and was worried by it. She feared he would make chaos. She then imprisoned him in the Yongjuan. She said the emperor's illness was severe. His attendants could not see him.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü heard and was worried by it. She feared he would make chaos. She imprisoned him in the Yongjuan. She said the emperor's illness was severe. His attendants could not see him.

context.previous: 我未壯，壯即為變。」
context.next: 太后曰：「凡有天下治為萬民命者，蓋之如天，容之如地，上有歡心以安百姓，百姓欣然以事其上，歡欣交通而天下治。

translations.chinese: 太后曰：「凡有天下治為萬民命者，蓋之如天，容之如地，上有歡心以安百姓，百姓欣然以事其上，歡欣交通而天下治。
translations.literal: Empress dowager said: 'All have world govern as ten thousand people fate, cover like heaven, contain like earth, above has happy heart to pacify commoners, commoners joyfully to serve their superiors, happy joy communicate and world govern.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager said: 'All who govern the world and determine the fate of the ten thousand people must cover like heaven, contain like earth. Above must have happy hearts to pacify the commoners. The commoners must joyfully serve their superiors. Happy joy must communicate and the world be governed.

context.previous: 太后聞而患之，恐其為亂，乃幽之永卷中，言帝病甚，左右莫得見。
context.next: 今皇帝病久不已，乃失惑惛亂，不能繼嗣奉宗廟祭祀，不可屬天下，其代之。」

translations.chinese: 今皇帝病久不已，乃失惑惛亂，不能繼嗣奉宗廟祭祀，不可屬天下，其代之。」
translations.literal: Now emperor illness long not cease, then lost confused muddled chaotic, cannot continue heirs offer ancestral temple sacrifices, cannot entrust world, replace him.'
translations.idiomatic: Now the emperor's illness has long not ceased. He is then lost, confused, muddled, chaotic. He cannot continue the heirs and offer ancestral temple sacrifices. He cannot be entrusted with the world. Replace him.'

context.previous: 太后曰：「凡有天下治為萬民命者，蓋之如天，容之如地，上有歡心以安百姓，百姓欣然以事其上，歡欣交通而天下治。
context.next: 群臣皆頓首言：「皇太后為天下齊民計所以安宗廟社稷甚深，群臣頓首奉詔。」

translations.chinese: 群臣皆頓首言：「皇太后為天下齊民計所以安宗廟社稷甚深，群臣頓首奉詔。」
translations.literal: Multitude ministers all kowtowed said: 'Empress dowager for world equal people plan so pacify ancestral temple altar grain very deep, multitude ministers kowtow receive decree.'
translations.idiomatic: All the ministers kowtowed and said: 'The Empress Dowager plans deeply for the world's equal people to pacify the ancestral temple and altar of grain. All ministers kowtow and receive the decree.'

context.previous: 今皇帝病久不已，乃失惑惛亂，不能繼嗣奉宗廟祭祀，不可屬天下，其代之。」
context.next: 帝廢位，太后幽殺之。

translations.chinese: 帝廢位，太后幽殺之。
translations.literal: The emperor's position was abolished. The Empress Dowager imprisoned and killed him.
translations.idiomatic: The emperor's position was abolished. Empress Lü imprisoned and killed him.

context.previous: 群臣皆頓首言：「皇太后為天下齊民計所以安宗廟社稷甚深，群臣頓首奉詔。」
context.next: 五月丙辰，立常山王義為帝，更名曰弘。

translations.chinese: 五月丙辰，立常山王義為帝，更名曰弘。
translations.literal: In the fifth month, Bing Chen day, King Yi of Changshan was established as emperor. His name was changed to Hong.
translations.idiomatic: In the fifth month, Bing Chen day, King Yi of Changshan was established as emperor. His name was changed to Hong.

context.previous: 帝廢位，太后幽殺之。
context.next: 不稱元年者，以太后制天下事也。

translations.chinese: 不稱元年者，以太后制天下事也。
translations.literal: He did not call it the first year because the Empress Dowager controlled world affairs.
translations.idiomatic: He did not call it the first year because the Empress Dowager controlled world affairs.

context.previous: 五月丙辰，立常山王義為帝，更名曰弘。
context.next: 以軹侯朝為常山王。

translations.chinese: 以軹侯朝為常山王。
translations.literal: Lord Zhi Zhao became King of Changshan.
translations.idiomatic: Lord Zhi Zhao became the King of Changshan.

context.previous: 不稱元年者，以太后制天下事也。
context.next: 置太尉官，絳侯勃為太尉。

translations.chinese: 置太尉官，絳侯勃為太尉。
translations.literal: The Grand Marshal office was established. Marquis Jiang Zhou Bo became Grand Marshal.
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Marshal office was established. Marquis Jiang Zhou Bo became Grand Marshal.

context.previous: 以軹侯朝為常山王。
context.next: 五年八月，淮陽王薨，以弟壺關侯武為淮陽王。

translations.chinese: 五年八月，淮陽王薨，以弟壺關侯武為淮陽王。
translations.literal: In the fifth year, eighth month, King of Huaiyang passed. His younger brother Lord Huguan Wu became King of Huaiyang.
translations.idiomatic: In the fifth year, eighth month, the King of Huaiyang passed. His younger brother Lord Huguan Wu became the King of Huaiyang.

context.previous: 置太尉官，絳侯勃為太尉。
context.next: 六年十月，太后曰呂王嘉居處驕恣，廢之，以肅王臺弟呂產為呂王。

translations.chinese: 六年十月，太后曰呂王嘉居處驕恣，廢之，以肅王臺弟呂產為呂王。
translations.literal: In the sixth year, tenth month, the Empress Dowager said King Lü Jia's dwelling and conduct were arrogant and unrestrained. She abolished him. King Su Tai's younger brother Lü Chan became King Lü.
translations.idiomatic: In the sixth year, tenth month, the Empress Dowager said King Lü Jia's dwelling and conduct were arrogant and unrestrained. She abolished him. King Su Tai's younger brother Lü Chan became King Lü.

context.previous: 五年八月，淮陽王薨，以弟壺關侯武為淮陽王。
context.next: 夏，赦天下。

translations.chinese: 夏，赦天下。
translations.literal: In summer, there was an amnesty for the world.
translations.idiomatic: In summer, there was an amnesty for the world.

context.previous: 六年十月，太后曰呂王嘉居處驕恣，廢之，以肅王臺弟呂產為呂王。
context.next: 封齊悼惠王子興居為東牟侯。

translations.chinese: 封齊悼惠王子興居為東牟侯。
translations.literal: King Dao Hui of Qi's son Zixingju was enfeoffed as Lord Dong Mou.
translations.idiomatic: King Dao Hui of Qi's son Zixingju was enfeoffed as Lord Dong Mou.

context.previous: 夏，赦天下。

translations.chinese: 七年正月，太后召趙王友。
translations.literal: In the seventh year, first month, the Empress Dowager summoned King You of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: In the seventh year, first month, the Empress Dowager summoned King You of Zhao.

context.next: 友以諸呂女為受后，弗愛，愛他姬，諸呂女妒，怒去，讒之於太后，誣以罪過，曰：「呂氏安得王！

translations.chinese: 友以諸呂女為受后，弗愛，愛他姬，諸呂女妒，怒去，讒之於太后，誣以罪過，曰：「呂氏安得王！
translations.literal: You with various Lu female as Shou Hou, not loved, loved other Ji, various Lu female jealous, angered left, slandered to empress dowager, falsely accused with crimes faults, said: 'Lu clan how able wang!
translations.idiomatic: You had taken a Lü clan daughter as Shou Hou. He did not love her. He loved another concubine. The Lü clan daughter was jealous. She angrily left. She slandered him to the Empress Dowager. She falsely accused him of crimes and faults, saying: 'How can the Lü clan become kings!

context.previous: 七年正月，太后召趙王友。
context.next: 太后百歲後，吾必擊之」。

translations.chinese: 太后百歲後，吾必擊之」。
translations.literal: Empress dowager hundred years after, I certainly strike them.'
translations.idiomatic: After the Empress Dowager is a hundred years old, I will certainly strike them.'

context.previous: 友以諸呂女為受后，弗愛，愛他姬，諸呂女妒，怒去，讒之於太后，誣以罪過，曰：「呂氏安得王！
context.next: 太后怒，以故召趙王。

translations.chinese: 太后怒，以故召趙王。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager was angered. Because of this she summoned King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü was angered. Because of this she summoned the King of Zhao.

context.previous: 太后百歲後，吾必擊之」。
context.next: 趙王至，置邸不見，令衛圍守之，弗與食。

translations.chinese: 趙王至，置邸不見，令衛圍守之，弗與食。
translations.literal: King of Zhao arrived. He was placed in the residence but not seen. Guards were ordered to surround and defend him. He was not given food.
translations.idiomatic: the King of Zhao arrived. He was placed in the residence but not seen. Guards were ordered to surround and defend him. He was not given food.

context.previous: 太后怒，以故召趙王。
context.next: 其群臣或竊饋，輒捕論之，趙王餓，乃歌曰：「諸呂用事兮劉氏危，迫脅王侯兮彊授我妃。

translations.chinese: 其群臣或竊饋，輒捕論之，趙王餓，乃歌曰：「諸呂用事兮劉氏危，迫脅王侯兮彊授我妃。
translations.literal: His ministers some secretly fed, then captured judged them, Zhao Wang hungry, then sang: 'Various Lu use affairs ah Liu clan danger, coerce threaten wang hou ah strong give me consort.
translations.idiomatic: His ministers secretly fed him some. They were then captured and judged. the King of Zhao was hungry. He sang: 'The various Lü use affairs, the Liu clan is in danger. They coerce and threaten kings and marquises, strongly giving me a consort.

context.previous: 趙王至，置邸不見，令衛圍守之，弗與食。
context.next: 我妃既妒兮誣我以惡，讒女亂國兮上曾不寤。

translations.chinese: 我妃既妒兮誣我以惡，讒女亂國兮上曾不寤。
translations.literal: My consort is already jealous, falsely accuses me of evil. The slanderous woman chaos the state, above never awakens.
translations.idiomatic: My consort is already jealous, falsely accuses me of evil. The slanderous woman chaos the state, above never awakens.

context.previous: 其群臣或竊饋，輒捕論之，趙王餓，乃歌曰：「諸呂用事兮劉氏危，迫脅王侯兮彊授我妃。
context.next: 我無忠臣兮何故棄國？

translations.chinese: 我無忠臣兮何故棄國？
translations.literal: I without loyal ministers ah what reason abandon state?
translations.idiomatic: I have no loyal ministers. For what reason do they abandon the state?

context.previous: 我妃既妒兮誣我以惡，讒女亂國兮上曾不寤。
context.next: 自決中野兮蒼天舉直！

translations.chinese: 自決中野兮蒼天舉直！
translations.literal: Self decide middle wilderness ah blue heaven raise straight!
translations.idiomatic: I will decide in the middle wilderness. Blue heaven raises the straight!

context.previous: 我無忠臣兮何故棄國？
context.next: 于嗟不可悔兮寧蚤自財。

translations.chinese: 于嗟不可悔兮寧蚤自財。
translations.literal: Alas, it cannot be regretted. Rather early, make myself wealthy.
translations.idiomatic: Alas, it cannot be regretted. Rather early, make myself wealthy.

context.previous: 自決中野兮蒼天舉直！
context.next: 為王而餓死兮誰者憐之！

translations.chinese: 為王而餓死兮誰者憐之！
translations.literal: As wang and starve die ah who pity it!
translations.idiomatic: As king and starve to death, who will pity it!

context.previous: 于嗟不可悔兮寧蚤自財。
context.next: 呂氏絕理兮託天報仇。」

translations.chinese: 呂氏絕理兮託天報仇。」
translations.literal: The Lü clan cuts off reason. I entrust heaven to avenge.
translations.idiomatic: The Lü clan cuts off reason. I entrust heaven to avenge.

context.previous: 為王而餓死兮誰者憐之！
context.next: 丁丑，趙王幽死，以民禮葬之長安民冢次。

translations.chinese: 丁丑，趙王幽死，以民禮葬之長安民冢次。
translations.literal: Ding Chou, Zhao Wang imprisoned died, with commoner ritual buried him Chang'an commoner tomb beside.
translations.idiomatic: On Ding Chou day, the King of Zhao died imprisoned. He was buried with commoner ritual beside the Chang'an commoner tombs.

context.previous: 呂氏絕理兮託天報仇。」

translations.chinese: 己丑，日食，晝晦。
translations.literal: On Ji Chou day, there was a solar eclipse. Daytime was dark.
translations.idiomatic: On Ji Chou day, there was a solar eclipse. Daytime was dark.

context.next: 太后惡之，心不樂，乃謂左右曰：「此為我也。」

translations.chinese: 太后惡之，心不樂，乃謂左右曰：「此為我也。」
translations.literal: Empress dowager disliked it, heart not happy, then said to attendants: 'This for me.'
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager disliked it. Her heart was not happy. She said to her attendants: 'This is for me.'

context.previous: 己丑，日食，晝晦。

translations.chinese: 二月，徙梁王恢為趙王。
translations.literal: In the second month, King Hui of Liang was moved to be King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: In the second month, King Hui of Liang was moved to be the King of Zhao.

context.next: 呂王產徙為梁王，梁王不之國，為帝太傅。

translations.chinese: 呂王產徙為梁王，梁王不之國，為帝太傅。
translations.literal: King Lü Chan was moved to be King of Liang. The King of Liang did not go to his country. He became Emperor Grand Tutor.
translations.idiomatic: King Lü Chan was moved to be the King of Liang. The the King of Liang did not go to his country. He became Emperor Grand Tutor.

context.previous: 二月，徙梁王恢為趙王。
context.next: 立皇子平昌侯太為呂王。

translations.chinese: 立皇子平昌侯太為呂王。
translations.literal: The imperial son Lord Pingchang Tai was established as King Lü.
translations.idiomatic: The imperial son Lord Pingchang Tai was established as King Lü.

context.previous: 呂王產徙為梁王，梁王不之國，為帝太傅。
context.next: 更名梁曰呂，呂曰濟川。

translations.chinese: 更名梁曰呂，呂曰濟川。
translations.literal: Liang was renamed Lü. Lü was renamed Ji Chuan.
translations.idiomatic: Liang was renamed Lü. Lü was renamed Ji Chuan.

context.previous: 立皇子平昌侯太為呂王。
context.next: 太后女弟呂媭有女為營陵侯劉澤妻，澤為大將軍。

translations.chinese: 太后女弟呂媭有女為營陵侯劉澤妻，澤為大將軍。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager's younger sister Lü Kui had a daughter who was the wife of Lord Yingling Liu Ze. Ze was Grand General.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü's younger sister Lü Kui had a daughter who was the wife of Lord Yingling Liu Ze. Ze was Grand General.

context.previous: 更名梁曰呂，呂曰濟川。
context.next: 太后王諸呂，恐即崩後劉將軍為害，乃以劉澤為瑯邪王，以慰其心。

translations.chinese: 太后王諸呂，恐即崩後劉將軍為害，乃以劉澤為瑯邪王，以慰其心。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager made the various Lü kings. She feared that after she passed, General Liu would do harm. She then made Liu Ze King of Langya to comfort his heart.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü made the various Lü kings. She feared that after she passed, General Liu would do harm. She made Liu Ze the King of Langya to comfort his heart.

context.previous: 太后女弟呂媭有女為營陵侯劉澤妻，澤為大將軍。

translations.chinese: 梁王恢之徙王趙，心懷不樂。
translations.literal: When King Hui of Liang was moved to be King of Zhao, his heart harbored unhappiness.
translations.idiomatic: When King Hui of Liang was moved to be king of Zhao, his heart harbored unhappiness.

context.next: 太后以呂產女為趙王后。

translations.chinese: 太后以呂產女為趙王后。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager made Lü Chan's daughter King of Zhao's queen.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü made Lü Chan's daughter the King of Zhao's queen.

context.previous: 梁王恢之徙王趙，心懷不樂。
context.next: 王后從官皆諸呂，擅權，微伺趙王，趙王不得自恣。

translations.chinese: 王后從官皆諸呂，擅權，微伺趙王，趙王不得自恣。
translations.literal: The queen's attendants were all various Lü. They monopolized authority. They secretly spied on King of Zhao. King of Zhao was not able to be unrestrained.
translations.idiomatic: The queen's attendants were all various Lü. They monopolized authority. They secretly spied on king of Zhao. the King of Zhao was not able to be unrestrained.

context.previous: 太后以呂產女為趙王后。
context.next: 王有所愛姬，王后使人酖殺之。

translations.chinese: 王有所愛姬，王后使人酖殺之。
translations.literal: The king had a beloved concubine. The queen had people poison and kill her.
translations.idiomatic: The king had a beloved concubine. The queen had people poison and kill her.

context.previous: 王后從官皆諸呂，擅權，微伺趙王，趙王不得自恣。
context.next: 王乃為歌詩四章，令樂人歌之。

translations.chinese: 王乃為歌詩四章，令樂人歌之。
translations.literal: The king then made song poetry in four chapters. He ordered musicians to sing it.
translations.idiomatic: The king then made song poetry in four chapters. He ordered musicians to sing it.

context.previous: 王有所愛姬，王后使人酖殺之。
context.next: 王悲，六月即自殺。

translations.chinese: 王悲，六月即自殺。
translations.literal: The king was sad. In the sixth month he then committed suicide.
translations.idiomatic: The king was sad. In the sixth month he committed suicide.

context.previous: 王乃為歌詩四章，令樂人歌之。
context.next: 太后聞之，以為王用婦人棄宗廟禮，廢其嗣。

translations.chinese: 太后聞之，以為王用婦人棄宗廟禮，廢其嗣。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager heard it. She considered the king used women and abandoned ancestral temple ritual. She abolished his heir.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü heard it. She considered the king used women and abandoned ancestral temple ritual. She abolished his heir.

context.previous: 王悲，六月即自殺。

translations.chinese: 宣平侯張敖卒，以子偃為魯王，敖賜謚為魯元王。
translations.literal: Lord Xuanping Zhang Ao passed. His son Yan became King of Lu. Ao was granted the posthumous title King Lu Yuan.
translations.idiomatic: Lord Xuanping Zhang Ao passed. His son Yan became the King of Lu. Ao was granted the posthumous title King Lu Yuan.

translations.chinese: 秋，太后使使告代王，欲徙王趙。
translations.literal: In autumn, the Empress Dowager sent an envoy to inform King of Dai. She wished to move him to be King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: In autumn, the Empress Dowager sent an envoy to inform the King of Dai. She wished to move him to be king of Zhao.

context.next: 代王謝，願守代邊。

translations.chinese: 代王謝，願守代邊。
translations.literal: King of Dai declined. He wished to guard the Dai border.
translations.idiomatic: the King of Dai declined. He wished to guard the Dai border.

context.previous: 秋，太后使使告代王，欲徙王趙。

translations.chinese: 太傅產、丞相平等言，武信侯呂祿上侯，位次第一，請立為趙王。
translations.literal: Grand Tutor Chan and Chancellor Ping and others said: Lord Wuxin Lü Lu is an upper marquis. His position sequence is first. Please establish him as King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: Grand Tutor Chan and Chancellor Ping and others said: Lord Wuxin Lü Lu is an upper marquis. His position sequence is first. Please establish him as the King of Zhao.

context.next: 太后許之，追尊祿父康侯為趙昭王。

translations.chinese: 太后許之，追尊祿父康侯為趙昭王。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager permitted it. She posthumously honored Lü's father Lord Kang as King Zhao Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Lü permitted it. She posthumously honored Lü's father Lord Kang as King Zhao Zhao.

context.previous: 太傅產、丞相平等言，武信侯呂祿上侯，位次第一，請立為趙王。
context.next: 九月，燕靈王建薨，有美人子，太后使人殺之，無後，國除。

translations.chinese: 九月，燕靈王建薨，有美人子，太后使人殺之，無後，國除。
translations.literal: In the ninth month, King Ling of Yan Jian passed. He had a beautiful woman's son. The Empress Dowager had people kill him. He had no posterity. The state was eliminated.
translations.idiomatic: In the ninth month, King Ling of Yan Jian passed. He had a beautiful woman's son. Empress Lü had people kill him. He had no posterity. The state was eliminated.

context.previous: 太后許之，追尊祿父康侯為趙昭王。
context.next: 八年十月，立呂肅王子東平侯呂通為燕王，封通弟呂莊為東平侯。

translations.chinese: 八年十月，立呂肅王子東平侯呂通為燕王，封通弟呂莊為東平侯。
translations.literal: In the eighth year, tenth month, King Su Lü's son Lord Dongping Lü Tong was established as King of Yan. Tong's younger brother Lü Zhuang was enfeoffed as Lord Dongping.
translations.idiomatic: In the eighth year, tenth month, King Su Lü's son Lord Dongping Lü Tong was established as the King of Yan. Tong's younger brother Lü Zhuang was enfeoffed as Lord Dongping.

context.previous: 九月，燕靈王建薨，有美人子，太后使人殺之，無後，國除。

translations.chinese: 三月中，呂后祓，還過軹道，見物如蒼犬，據高后掖，忽弗復見。
translations.literal: Third month middle, Lü Empress purification, returning passed Zhi road, saw object like green dog, seized Empress Gao armpit, suddenly not again seen.
translations.idiomatic: In the middle of the third month, Empress Lü performed purification rites. On her return, passing through Zhi Road, she saw an object like a green dog that seized Empress Gao's armpit, then suddenly it was not seen again.

context.next: 卜之，云趙王如意為祟。

translations.chinese: 卜之，云趙王如意為祟。
translations.literal: They divined it and said that King Ruyi of Zhao was causing the evil spirit.
translations.idiomatic: They divined it and said that King Ruyi of Zhao was causing the evil spirit.

context.previous: 三月中，呂后祓，還過軹道，見物如蒼犬，據高后掖，忽弗復見。
context.next: 高后遂病掖傷。

translations.chinese: 高后遂病掖傷。
translations.literal: Empress Gao then became sick from the armpit injury.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Gao then became sick from the armpit injury.

context.previous: 卜之，云趙王如意為祟。

translations.chinese: 高后為外孫魯元王偃年少，蚤失父母，孤弱，乃封張敖前姬兩子，侈為新都侯，壽為樂昌侯，以輔魯元王偃。
translations.literal: Empress Gao, for her maternal grandson King Yuan of Lu, Yan, who was young and had early lost his parents, orphaned and weak, then enfeoffed the two sons of Zhang Ao's former consort - Chi as Marquis of Xindu, Shou as Marquis of Lechang - to assist King Yuan of Lu, Yan.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Gao, for her maternal grandson King Yuan of Lu, Yan, who was young and had early lost his parents, orphaned and weak, then enfeoffed the two sons of Zhang Ao's former consort - Chi as Lord of Xindu, Shou as Lord of Lechang - to assist King Yuan of Lu, Yan.

context.next: 及封中大謁者張釋為建陵侯，呂榮為祝茲侯。

translations.chinese: 及封中大謁者張釋為建陵侯，呂榮為祝茲侯。
translations.literal: And enfeoffed Palace Chamberlain Zhang Shi as Jianling Hou, Lü Rong as Zhuzi Hou.
translations.idiomatic: And she enfeoffed the Palace Chamberlain Zhang Shi as Marquis of Jianling, Lü Rong as Marquis of Zhuzi.

context.previous: 高后為外孫魯元王偃年少，蚤失父母，孤弱，乃封張敖前姬兩子，侈為新都侯，壽為樂昌侯，以輔魯元王偃。
context.next: 諸中宦者令丞皆為關內侯，食邑五百戶。

translations.chinese: 諸中宦者令丞皆為關內侯，食邑五百戶。
translations.literal: All the various palace eunuchs, commanders, and assistants became marquises within the pass, with fiefdoms of five hundred households.
translations.idiomatic: All the various palace eunuchs, commanders, and assistants became marquises within the pass, with fiefdoms of five hundred households.

context.previous: 及封中大謁者張釋為建陵侯，呂榮為祝茲侯。

translations.chinese: 七月中，高后病甚，乃令趙王呂祿為上將軍，軍北軍；
translations.literal: Seventh month middle, Empress Gao illness very severe, then commanded Zhao King Lü Lu as Supreme General, garrisoned Northern Army;
translations.idiomatic: In the middle of the seventh month, Empress Gao's illness became very severe, so she commanded King Lü of Zhao to be Supreme General, garrisoning the Northern Army;

context.next: 呂王產居南軍。

translations.chinese: 呂王產居南軍。
translations.literal: Lü King Chan resided Southern Army.
translations.idiomatic: King Lü Chan resided over the Southern Army.

context.previous: 七月中，高后病甚，乃令趙王呂祿為上將軍，軍北軍；
context.next: 呂太后誡產、祿曰：「高帝已定天下，與大臣約，曰『非劉氏王者，天下共擊之』。

translations.chinese: 呂太后誡產、祿曰：「高帝已定天下，與大臣約，曰『非劉氏王者，天下共擊之』。
translations.literal: Lü Empress Dowager warned Chan, Lu said: 'Emperor Gao already pacified realm, with ministers covenant, said 'Not Liu clan kings, realm together attack them'.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Dowager Lü warned Chan and Lu saying: 'Emperor Gao has already pacified the realm, and made a covenant with the ministers, saying 'Those who are not kings of the Liu clan, the realm shall together attack them'.'

context.previous: 呂王產居南軍。
context.next: 今呂氏王，大臣弗平。

translations.chinese: 今呂氏王，大臣弗平。
translations.literal: Now Lü clan kings, ministers not peaceful.
translations.idiomatic: Now the Lü clan has kings, the ministers are not peaceful.

context.previous: 呂太后誡產、祿曰：「高帝已定天下，與大臣約，曰『非劉氏王者，天下共擊之』。
context.next: 我即崩，帝年少，大臣恐為變。

translations.chinese: 我即崩，帝年少，大臣恐為變。
translations.literal: If I then collapse, the emperor is young, the ministers fear they will make rebellion.
translations.idiomatic: If i then collapse, the emperor is young, the ministers fear they will make rebellion.

context.previous: 今呂氏王，大臣弗平。
context.next: 必據兵衛宮，慎毋送喪，毋為人所制。」

translations.chinese: 必據兵衛宮，慎毋送喪，毋為人所制。」
translations.literal: Must occupy troops guard palace, careful do not send funeral, do not be controlled by people.'
translations.idiomatic: You must occupy the troops and guard the palace. Be careful not to send a funeral procession, and do not be controlled by others.'

context.previous: 我即崩，帝年少，大臣恐為變。
context.next: 辛巳，高后崩，遺詔賜諸侯王各千金，將相列侯郎吏皆以秩賜金。

translations.chinese: 辛巳，高后崩，遺詔賜諸侯王各千金，將相列侯郎吏皆以秩賜金。
translations.literal: On xinsi, Empress Gao collapsed. Her last will edict granted each of the feudal lord kings a thousand gold, and granted gold to all generals, chancellors, marquises, and attendant officials according to their rank.
translations.idiomatic: On xinsi, Empress Gao collapsed. Her last will edict granted each of the feudal lord kings a thousand gold, and granted gold to all generals, chancellors, marquises, and attendant officials according to their rank.

context.previous: 必據兵衛宮，慎毋送喪，毋為人所制。」
context.next: 大赦天下。

translations.chinese: 大赦天下。
translations.literal: A great amnesty was granted throughout the realm.
translations.idiomatic: A great amnesty was granted throughout the realm.

context.previous: 辛巳，高后崩，遺詔賜諸侯王各千金，將相列侯郎吏皆以秩賜金。
context.next: 以呂王產為相國，以呂祿女為帝后。

translations.chinese: 以呂王產為相國，以呂祿女為帝后。
translations.literal: With Lü King Chan as Chancellor, with Lü Lu daughter as emperor empress.
translations.idiomatic: Lü King Chan was made Chancellor, and Lü Lu's daughter was made the emperor's empress.

context.previous: 大赦天下。

translations.chinese: 高后已葬，以左丞相審食其為帝太傅。
translations.literal: After Empress Gao was buried, the Left Chancellor Shen Shiqi was made the emperor's Grand Tutor.
translations.idiomatic: After Empress Gao was buried, the Left Chancellor shen Shiqi was made the emperor's Grand Tutor.

translations.chinese: 朱虛侯劉章有氣力，東牟侯興居其弟也。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Zhuxu, Liu Zhang, had strength and power. The Marquis of Dongmu, Xingju, was his younger brother.
translations.idiomatic: The Lord of Zhuxu, Liu Zhang, had strength and power. The Lord of Dongmu, Xingju, was his younger brother.

context.next: 皆齊哀王弟，居長安。

translations.chinese: 皆齊哀王弟，居長安。
translations.literal: All Qi Ai King younger brothers, resided Chang'an.
translations.idiomatic: They were all younger brothers of King Ai of Qi, residing in Chang'an.

context.previous: 朱虛侯劉章有氣力，東牟侯興居其弟也。
context.next: 當是時，諸呂用事擅權，欲為亂，畏高帝故大臣絳、灌等，未敢發。

translations.chinese: 當是時，諸呂用事擅權，欲為亂，畏高帝故大臣絳、灌等，未敢發。
translations.literal: When this time, various Lü handled affairs monopolized power, wished make rebellion, feared Gao emperor former ministers Jiang, Guan etc., not dared dispatch.
translations.idiomatic: At this time, the various Lü clan handled affairs and monopolized power, wishing to make rebellion. They feared Emperor Gao's former ministers Jiang, Guan, and others, and did not dare to dispatch.

context.previous: 皆齊哀王弟，居長安。
context.next: 朱虛侯婦，呂祿女，陰知其謀。

translations.chinese: 朱虛侯婦，呂祿女，陰知其謀。
translations.literal: Zhuxu Hou wife, Lü Lu daughter, secretly knew their plot.
translations.idiomatic: The wife of the Marquis of Zhuxu, Lü Lu's daughter, secretly knew of their plot.

context.previous: 當是時，諸呂用事擅權，欲為亂，畏高帝故大臣絳、灌等，未敢發。
context.next: 恐見誅，乃陰令人告其兄齊王，欲令發兵西，誅諸呂而立。

translations.chinese: 恐見誅，乃陰令人告其兄齊王，欲令發兵西，誅諸呂而立。
translations.literal: Feared seen executed, then secretly had person inform her brother Qi King, wished make dispatch troops west, execute various Lü and establish.
translations.idiomatic: Fearing she would be seen and executed, she secretly had someone inform her brother the the King of Qi, wishing to make him dispatch troops west, execute the various Lü clan members and establish himself.

context.previous: 朱虛侯婦，呂祿女，陰知其謀。
context.next: 朱虛侯欲從中與大臣為應。

translations.chinese: 朱虛侯欲從中與大臣為應。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Zhuxu wished to respond from within with the ministers.
translations.idiomatic: The Lord of Zhuxu wished to respond from within with the ministers.

context.previous: 恐見誅，乃陰令人告其兄齊王，欲令發兵西，誅諸呂而立。
context.next: 齊王欲發兵，其相弗聽。

translations.chinese: 齊王欲發兵，其相弗聽。
translations.literal: The King of Qi wished to dispatch troops, but his chancellor did not listen.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Qi wished to dispatch troops, but his chancellor did not listen.

context.previous: 朱虛侯欲從中與大臣為應。
context.next: 八月丙午，齊王欲使人誅相，相召平乃反，舉兵欲圍王，王因殺其相，遂發兵東，詐奪瑯邪王兵，并將之而西。

translations.chinese: 八月丙午，齊王欲使人誅相，相召平乃反，舉兵欲圍王，王因殺其相，遂發兵東，詐奪瑯邪王兵，并將之而西。
translations.literal: On the bingwu day of the eighth month, the King of Qi wished to have someone execute his chancellor. Chancellor Zhao Ping then rebelled, raised troops wishing to surround the king. The king then killed his chancellor, then dispatched troops east, falsely seized the King of Langye's troops, combined and led them west.
translations.idiomatic: On the bingwu day of the eighth month, the the King of Qi wished to have someone execute his chancellor. Chancellor Zhao Ping then rebelled, raised troops wishing to surround the king, and the king then killed his chancellor, then dispatched troops east, falsely seized the the King of Langye's troops, combined and led them west.

context.previous: 齊王欲發兵，其相弗聽。
context.next: 語在齊王語中。

translations.chinese: 語在齊王語中。
translations.literal: The words are in the Qi King biography.
translations.idiomatic: The words are in the Qi King biography.

context.previous: 八月丙午，齊王欲使人誅相，相召平乃反，舉兵欲圍王，王因殺其相，遂發兵東，詐奪瑯邪王兵，并將之而西。

translations.chinese: 齊王乃遺諸侯王書曰：「高帝平定天下，王諸子弟，悼惠王王齊。
translations.literal: Qi King then sent feudal lord kings letter said: 'Emperor Gao pacified realm, enfeoffed various sons brothers, Dao Hui King enfeoffed Qi.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Qi then sent a letter to the feudal lord kings saying: 'Emperor Gao pacified the realm, enfeoffed his various sons and brothers. King Dao Hui was enfeoffed in Qi.

context.next: 悼惠王薨，孝惠帝使留侯良立臣為齊王。

translations.chinese: 悼惠王薨，孝惠帝使留侯良立臣為齊王。
translations.literal: When King Dao Hui passed away, Emperor Xiaohui had Marquis Liu Hou Liang establish me as King of Qi.
translations.idiomatic: When King Dao Hui passed away, Emperor Xiaohui had Lord Liu Hou Liang establish me as the King of Qi.

context.previous: 齊王乃遺諸侯王書曰：「高帝平定天下，王諸子弟，悼惠王王齊。
context.next: 孝惠崩，高后用事，春秋高，聽諸呂，擅廢帝更立，又比殺三趙王，滅梁、趙、燕以王諸呂，分齊為四。

translations.chinese: 孝惠崩，高后用事，春秋高，聽諸呂，擅廢帝更立，又比殺三趙王，滅梁、趙、燕以王諸呂，分齊為四。
translations.literal: Filial Hui collapsed, Empress Gao handled affairs, years high, listened to various Lü, monopolized deposed emperor changed establishment, moreover successively killed three Zhao kings, extinguished Liang, Zhao, Yan to enfeoff various Lü, divided Qi into four.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor Xiaohui collapsed, Empress Gao handled affairs. She was advanced in years, listened to the various Lü clan, monopolized deposing the emperor and establishing another, moreover successively killed three kings of Zhao, extinguished Liang, Zhao, Yan to enfeoff the various Lü clan, and divided Qi into four.

context.previous: 悼惠王薨，孝惠帝使留侯良立臣為齊王。
context.next: 忠臣進諫，上惑亂弗聽。

translations.chinese: 忠臣進諫，上惑亂弗聽。
translations.literal: Loyal ministers advanced and remonstrated, but the emperor was confused and chaotic and did not listen.
translations.idiomatic: Loyal ministers advanced and remonstrated, but the emperor was confused and chaotic and did not listen.

context.previous: 孝惠崩，高后用事，春秋高，聽諸呂，擅廢帝更立，又比殺三趙王，滅梁、趙、燕以王諸呂，分齊為四。
context.next: 今高后崩，而帝春秋富，未能治天下，固恃大臣諸侯。

translations.chinese: 今高后崩，而帝春秋富，未能治天下，固恃大臣諸侯。
translations.literal: Now Empress Gao has collapsed, and the emperor is rich in years but not yet able to govern the realm. He firmly relies on the ministers and feudal lords.
translations.idiomatic: Now Empress Gao has collapsed, and the emperor is rich in years but not yet able to govern the realm. He firmly relies on the ministers and feudal lords.

context.previous: 忠臣進諫，上惑亂弗聽。
context.next: 而諸呂又擅自尊官，聚兵嚴威，劫列侯忠臣，矯制以令天下，宗廟所以危。

translations.chinese: 而諸呂又擅自尊官，聚兵嚴威，劫列侯忠臣，矯制以令天下，宗廟所以危。
translations.literal: Yet various Lü again monopolized self honored officials, gathered troops strict awe, coerced marquises loyal ministers, falsified decrees to command realm, ancestral temple therefore endangered.
translations.idiomatic: Yet the various Lü again monopolized self-honored officials, gathered troops with strict awe, coerced marquises and loyal ministers, falsified decrees to command the realm - this is why the ancestral temple is endangered.

context.previous: 今高后崩，而帝春秋富，未能治天下，固恃大臣諸侯。
context.next: 寡人率兵入誅不當為王者。」

translations.chinese: 寡人率兵入誅不當為王者。」
translations.literal: I lead troops enter execute not proper be kings.'
translations.idiomatic: I will lead troops to enter and execute those who should not be kings.'

context.previous: 而諸呂又擅自尊官，聚兵嚴威，劫列侯忠臣，矯制以令天下，宗廟所以危。
context.next: 漢聞之，相國呂產等乃遣潁陰侯灌嬰將兵擊之。

translations.chinese: 漢聞之，相國呂產等乃遣潁陰侯灌嬰將兵擊之。
translations.literal: Han heard it, Chancellor Lü Chan etc. then dispatched Yingyin Hou Guan Ying led troops attacked them.
translations.idiomatic: Han heard of it, and Chancellor Lü Chan and others then dispatched the Marquis of Yingyin, Guan Ying, to lead troops and attack them.

context.previous: 寡人率兵入誅不當為王者。」
context.next: 灌嬰至滎陽，乃謀曰：「諸呂權兵關中，欲危劉氏而自立。

translations.chinese: 灌嬰至滎陽，乃謀曰：「諸呂權兵關中，欲危劉氏而自立。
translations.literal: Guan Ying arrived Xingyang, then plotted said: 'Various Lü control troops Guanzhong, wish endanger Liu clan yet self establish.
translations.idiomatic: Guan Ying arrived at Xingyang, then plotted and said: 'The various Lü control the troops in Guanzhong and wish to endanger the Liu clan while establishing themselves.

context.previous: 漢聞之，相國呂產等乃遣潁陰侯灌嬰將兵擊之。
context.next: 今我破齊還報，此益呂氏之資也。」

translations.chinese: 今我破齊還報，此益呂氏之資也。」
translations.literal: Now I defeat Qi return report, this increases Lü clan resources also.'
translations.idiomatic: Now if I defeat Qi and return to report, this will increase the Lü clan's resources.'

context.previous: 灌嬰至滎陽，乃謀曰：「諸呂權兵關中，欲危劉氏而自立。
context.next: 乃留屯滎陽，使使諭齊王及諸侯，與連和，以待呂氏變，共誅之。

translations.chinese: 乃留屯滎陽，使使諭齊王及諸侯，與連和，以待呂氏變，共誅之。
translations.literal: Then stayed garrisoned Xingyang, sent envoys explained Qi King and feudal lords, with allied together, to wait Lü clan change, together execute them.
translations.idiomatic: He stayed garrisoned at Xingyang, sent envoys to explain to the the King of Qi and the feudal lords, allied with them together, to wait for the Lü clan's change, and together execute them.

context.previous: 今我破齊還報，此益呂氏之資也。」
context.next: 齊王聞之，乃還兵西界待約。

translations.chinese: 齊王聞之，乃還兵西界待約。
translations.literal: The King of Qi heard of it, then returned his troops to the western border to wait for an agreement.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Qi heard of it, then returned his troops to the western border to wait for an agreement.

context.previous: 乃留屯滎陽，使使諭齊王及諸侯，與連和，以待呂氏變，共誅之。

translations.chinese: 呂祿、呂產欲發亂關中，內憚絳侯、朱虛等，外畏齊、楚兵，又恐灌嬰畔之，欲待灌嬰兵與齊合而發，猶豫未決。
translations.literal: Lü Lu, Lü Chan wished dispatch rebellion Guanzhong, internally dreaded Jiang Hou, Zhuxu etc., externally feared Qi, Chu troops, moreover feared Guan Ying rebel against them, wished wait Guan Ying troops with Qi combine then dispatch, hesitated undecided.
translations.idiomatic: Lü Lu and Lü Chan wished to dispatch rebellion in Guanzhong. Internally they dreaded the Marquis of Jiang, Zhuxu, and others; externally they feared the troops of Qi and Chu; moreover they feared Guan Ying would rebel against them. They wished to wait for Guan Ying's troops to combine with Qi then dispatch, but hesitated undecided.

context.next: 當是時，濟川王太、淮陽王武、常山王朝名為少帝弟，及魯元王呂后外孫，皆年少未之國，居長安。

translations.chinese: 當是時，濟川王太、淮陽王武、常山王朝名為少帝弟，及魯元王呂后外孫，皆年少未之國，居長安。
translations.literal: When this time, Jichuan King Tai, Huaiyang King Wu, Changshan King Chao named as young emperor younger brothers, and Lu Yuan King Lü Empress Dowager maternal grandson, all young not gone to their states, resided Chang'an.
translations.idiomatic: At this time, King Tai of Jichuan, King Wu of Huaiyang, King Chao of Changshan were named as the young emperor's younger brothers, and King Yuan of Lu, Empress Dowager Lü's maternal grandson - all were young and had not gone to their states, residing in Chang'an.

context.previous: 呂祿、呂產欲發亂關中，內憚絳侯、朱虛等，外畏齊、楚兵，又恐灌嬰畔之，欲待灌嬰兵與齊合而發，猶豫未決。
context.next: 趙王祿、梁王產各將兵居南北軍，皆呂氏之人。

translations.chinese: 趙王祿、梁王產各將兵居南北軍，皆呂氏之人。
translations.literal: Zhao King Lu, Liang King Chan each led troops resided north south armies, all Lü clan people.
translations.idiomatic: King Lu of Zhao and King Chan of Liang each led troops and resided over the north and south armies - all were Lü clan people.

context.previous: 當是時，濟川王太、淮陽王武、常山王朝名為少帝弟，及魯元王呂后外孫，皆年少未之國，居長安。
context.next: 列侯群臣莫自堅其命。

translations.chinese: 列侯群臣莫自堅其命。
translations.literal: None of the marquises and ministers strengthened their own fate.
translations.idiomatic: None of the marquises and ministers strengthened their own fate.

context.previous: 趙王祿、梁王產各將兵居南北軍，皆呂氏之人。

translations.chinese: 太尉絳侯勃不得入軍中主兵。
translations.literal: Grand Commandant Marquis Jiang Bo was not able to enter the army and control the troops.
translations.idiomatic: Commander-in-chief Marquis Jiang Bo was not able to enter the army and control the troops.

context.next: 曲周侯酈商老病，其子寄與呂祿善。

translations.chinese: 曲周侯酈商老病，其子寄與呂祿善。
translations.literal: Quzhou Hou Li Shang old ill, his son Ji with Lü Lu good.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Quzhou, Li Shang, was old and ill. His son Ji was on good terms with Lü Lu.

context.previous: 太尉絳侯勃不得入軍中主兵。
context.next: 絳侯乃與丞相陳平謀，使人劫酈商。

translations.chinese: 絳侯乃與丞相陳平謀，使人劫酈商。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Jiang then plotted with Chancellor Chen Ping and had someone coerce Li Shang.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Jiang then plotted with Chancellor Chen Ping and had someone coerce Li Shang.

context.previous: 曲周侯酈商老病，其子寄與呂祿善。
context.next: 令其子寄往紿說呂祿曰：「高帝與呂后共定天下，劉氏所立九王，呂氏所立三王，皆大臣之議，事已布告諸侯，諸侯皆以為宜。

translations.chinese: 令其子寄往紿說呂祿曰：「高帝與呂后共定天下，劉氏所立九王，呂氏所立三王，皆大臣之議，事已布告諸侯，諸侯皆以為宜。
translations.literal: Commanded his son Ji go deceive persuade Lü Lu said: 'Emperor Gao with Lü Empress Dowager together pacified realm, Liu clan established nine kings, Lü clan established three kings, all ministers discussion, matter already announced proclaimed feudal lords, feudal lords all considered appropriate.
translations.idiomatic: He commanded his son Ji to go and deceive Lü Lu by saying: 'Emperor Gao and Empress Dowager Lü together pacified the realm. The Liu clan established nine kings, the Lü clan established three kings - all were the ministers' discussions. The matter has already been announced and proclaimed to the feudal lords, and the feudal lords all considered it appropriate.

context.previous: 絳侯乃與丞相陳平謀，使人劫酈商。
context.next: 今太后崩，帝少，而足下佩趙王印，不急之國守藩，乃為上將，將兵留此，為大臣諸侯所疑。

translations.chinese: 今太后崩，帝少，而足下佩趙王印，不急之國守藩，乃為上將，將兵留此，為大臣諸侯所疑。
translations.literal: Now the Empress Dowager has collapsed and the emperor is young, yet your excellency wears the Zhao King seal. You do not urgently go to your state to guard your fief, but instead become Supreme General, lead troops and stay here, causing you to be doubted by the ministers and feudal lords.
translations.idiomatic: Now the Empress Dowager has collapsed and the emperor is young, yet your excellency wears the Zhao King seal. You do not urgently go to your state to guard your fief, but instead become Supreme General, lead troops and stay here, causing you to be doubted by the ministers and feudal lords.

context.previous: 令其子寄往紿說呂祿曰：「高帝與呂后共定天下，劉氏所立九王，呂氏所立三王，皆大臣之議，事已布告諸侯，諸侯皆以為宜。
context.next: 足下何不歸印，以兵屬太尉？

translations.chinese: 足下何不歸印，以兵屬太尉？
translations.literal: Your excellency why not return seal, with troops belong Grand Commandant?
translations.idiomatic: Why doesn't your excellency return the seal and have the troops belong to the Grand Commandant?

context.previous: 今太后崩，帝少，而足下佩趙王印，不急之國守藩，乃為上將，將兵留此，為大臣諸侯所疑。
context.next: 請梁王歸相國印，與大臣盟而之國，齊兵必罷，大臣得安，足下高枕而王千里，此萬世之利也。」

translations.chinese: 請梁王歸相國印，與大臣盟而之國，齊兵必罷，大臣得安，足下高枕而王千里，此萬世之利也。」
translations.literal: Request Liang King return Chancellor seal, with ministers covenant then go to state, Qi troops must cease, ministers get peace, your excellency high pillow rule thousand li, this ten thousand generations benefit also.'
translations.idiomatic: Request that the the King of Liang return the Chancellor seal, make a covenant with the ministers and then go to his state. The Qi troops will certainly cease, the ministers will get peace, your excellency can rule a thousand li with peace of mind - this is the benefit for ten thousand generations.'

context.previous: 足下何不歸印，以兵屬太尉？
context.next: 呂祿信然其計，欲歸將印，以兵屬太尉。

translations.chinese: 呂祿信然其計，欲歸將印，以兵屬太尉。
translations.literal: Lü Lu believed indeed their plan, wished return general seal, with troops belong Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: Lü Lu believed their plan indeed, and wished to return the general seal and have the troops belong to the Grand Commandant.

context.previous: 請梁王歸相國印，與大臣盟而之國，齊兵必罷，大臣得安，足下高枕而王千里，此萬世之利也。」
context.next: 使人報呂產及諸呂老人，或以為便，或曰不便，計猶豫未有所決。

translations.chinese: 使人報呂產及諸呂老人，或以為便，或曰不便，計猶豫未有所決。
translations.literal: Sent person reported Lü Chan and various Lü elders, some considered convenient, some said inconvenient, plan hesitated not had decision.
translations.idiomatic: He sent someone to report to Lü Chan and the various Lü elders. Some considered it convenient, some said it was inconvenient. The plan hesitated and had not reached a decision.

context.previous: 呂祿信然其計，欲歸將印，以兵屬太尉。
context.next: 呂祿信酈寄，時與出游獵。

translations.chinese: 呂祿信酈寄，時與出游獵。
translations.literal: Lü Lu trusted Li Ji, often with him went out hunting.
translations.idiomatic: Lü Lu trusted Li Ji and often went out hunting with him.

context.previous: 使人報呂產及諸呂老人，或以為便，或曰不便，計猶豫未有所決。
context.next: 過其姑呂媭，媭大怒，曰：「若為將而棄軍，呂氏今無處矣。」

translations.chinese: 過其姑呂媭，媭大怒，曰：「若為將而棄軍，呂氏今無處矣。」
translations.literal: Passed his aunt Lü Xu, Xu greatly angered, said: 'You as general yet abandon army, Lü clan now no place.'
translations.idiomatic: He passed by his aunt Lü Xu. Xu was greatly angered and said: 'You are a general yet abandon the army. The Lü clan now has no place.'

context.previous: 呂祿信酈寄，時與出游獵。
context.next: 乃悉出珠玉寶器散堂下，曰：「毋為他人守也」

translations.chinese: 乃悉出珠玉寶器散堂下，曰：「毋為他人守也」
translations.literal: Then all brought out pearls jade treasure vessels scattered hall below, said: 'Do not for others guard also'
translations.idiomatic: She brought out all the pearls, jade, and treasure vessels and scattered them below the hall, saying: 'Do not guard them for others.'

context.previous: 過其姑呂媭，媭大怒，曰：「若為將而棄軍，呂氏今無處矣。」

translations.chinese: 左丞相食其免。
translations.literal: The Left Chancellor, Shi Yi, was dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: The Left Chancellor, Shi Yi, was dismissed.

translations.chinese: 八月庚申旦，平陽侯窋行御史大夫事，見相國產計事。
translations.literal: On the dawn of the gengshen day in the eighth month, the Marquis of Pingyang, Zhu, carried out the Imperial Secretary's matters and saw Chancellor Chan to discuss matters.
translations.idiomatic: On the dawn of the gengshen day in the eighth month, the Lord of Pingyang, Zhu, carried out the Imperial Secretary's matters and saw Chancellor Chan to discuss matters.

context.next: 郎中令賈壽使從齊來，因數產曰：「王不蚤之國，今雖欲行，尚可得邪？」

translations.chinese: 郎中令賈壽使從齊來，因數產曰：「王不蚤之國，今雖欲行，尚可得邪？」
translations.literal: Chamberlain for Attendants Jia Shou envoy from Qi came, thus reproached Chan said: 'King not early go to state, now though wish go, still can get question?'
translations.idiomatic: The Chamberlain for Attendants, Jia Shou, came as envoy from Qi, and thus reproached Chan saying: 'The king did not go to his state early. Now though he wishes to go, can he still do so?'

context.previous: 八月庚申旦，平陽侯窋行御史大夫事，見相國產計事。
context.next: 具以灌嬰與齊楚合從，欲誅諸呂告產，乃趣產急入宮。

translations.chinese: 具以灌嬰與齊楚合從，欲誅諸呂告產，乃趣產急入宮。
translations.literal: Detailed with Guan Ying and Qi Chu allied together, wished execute various Lü informed Chan, then urged Chan quickly enter palace.
translations.idiomatic: He detailed how Guan Ying had allied with Qi and Chu, wishing to execute the various Lü clan, and informed Chan. He urged Chan to quickly enter the palace.

context.previous: 郎中令賈壽使從齊來，因數產曰：「王不蚤之國，今雖欲行，尚可得邪？」
context.next: 平陽侯頗聞其語，乃馳告丞相、太尉。

translations.chinese: 平陽侯頗聞其語，乃馳告丞相、太尉。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Pingyang somewhat heard their words, then galloped to inform the Chancellor and Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Pingyang somewhat heard their words, then galloped to inform the Chancellor and commander-in-chief.

context.previous: 具以灌嬰與齊楚合從，欲誅諸呂告產，乃趣產急入宮。
context.next: 太尉欲入北軍，不得入。

translations.chinese: 太尉欲入北軍，不得入。
translations.literal: The Grand Commandant wished to enter the Northern Army, but was not able to enter.
translations.idiomatic: The commander-in-chief wished to enter the Northern Army, but was not able to enter.

context.previous: 平陽侯頗聞其語，乃馳告丞相、太尉。
context.next: 襄平侯通尚符節。

translations.chinese: 襄平侯通尚符節。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Xiangping, Tong, carried the tally and credentials.
translations.idiomatic: The Lord of Xiangping, Tong, carried the tally and credentials.

context.previous: 太尉欲入北軍，不得入。
context.next: 乃令持節矯內太尉北軍。

translations.chinese: 乃令持節矯內太尉北軍。
translations.literal: He then commanded that holding the tally, they falsified entry into the Grand Commandant's Northern Army.
translations.idiomatic: He commanded that holding the tally, they falsified entry into the Grand Commandant's Northern Army.

context.previous: 襄平侯通尚符節。
context.next: 太尉復令酈寄與典客劉揭先說呂祿曰：「帝使太尉守北軍，欲足下之國，急歸將印辭去，不然，禍且起。」

translations.chinese: 太尉復令酈寄與典客劉揭先說呂祿曰：「帝使太尉守北軍，欲足下之國，急歸將印辭去，不然，禍且起。」
translations.literal: Grand Commandant again commanded Li Ji and Chamberlain for Dependencies Liu Jie first persuaded Lü Lu said: 'Emperor made Grand Commandant guard Northern Army, wishes your excellency go to state, urgently return general seal take leave go, otherwise, calamity will arise.'
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Commandant again commanded Li Ji and the Chamberlain for Dependencies Liu Jie to first persuade Lü Lu saying: 'The emperor made the Grand Commandant guard the Northern Army. He wishes your excellency to go to your state. Urgently return the general seal and take leave to go, otherwise calamity will arise.'

context.previous: 乃令持節矯內太尉北軍。
context.next: 呂祿以為酈兄不欺己，遂解印屬典客，而以兵授太尉。

translations.chinese: 呂祿以為酈兄不欺己，遂解印屬典客，而以兵授太尉。
translations.literal: Lü Lu considered Li brother not deceive self, then removed seal belonged Chamberlain for Dependencies, yet with troops gave Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: Lü Lu considered that his brother Li would not deceive him, so he removed the seal and gave it to the Chamberlain for Dependencies, and gave the troops to the Grand Commandant.

context.previous: 太尉復令酈寄與典客劉揭先說呂祿曰：「帝使太尉守北軍，欲足下之國，急歸將印辭去，不然，禍且起。」
context.next: 太尉將之入軍門，行令軍中曰：「為呂氏右袒，為劉氏左袒。」

translations.chinese: 太尉將之入軍門，行令軍中曰：「為呂氏右袒，為劉氏左袒。」
translations.literal: Grand Commandant led them enter army gate, issued command army middle said: 'For Lü clan right bare shoulder, for Liu clan left bare shoulder.'
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Commandant led them into the army gate and issued a command in the army saying: 'For the Lü clan, bare the right shoulder; for the Liu clan, bare the left shoulder.'

context.previous: 呂祿以為酈兄不欺己，遂解印屬典客，而以兵授太尉。
context.next: 軍中皆左袒為劉氏。

translations.chinese: 軍中皆左袒為劉氏。
translations.literal: All in the army bared their left shoulders for the Liu clan.
translations.idiomatic: All in the army bared their left shoulders for the Liu clan.

context.previous: 太尉將之入軍門，行令軍中曰：「為呂氏右袒，為劉氏左袒。」
context.next: 太尉行至，將軍呂祿亦已解上將印去，太尉遂將北軍。

translations.chinese: 太尉行至，將軍呂祿亦已解上將印去，太尉遂將北軍。
translations.literal: Grand Commandant advanced arrived, General Lü Lu also already removed Supreme General seal went, Grand Commandant then led Northern Army.
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Commandant advanced and arrived. General Lü Lu had also already removed the Supreme General seal and left. The Grand Commandant then led the Northern Army.

context.previous: 軍中皆左袒為劉氏。

translations.chinese: 然尚有南軍。
translations.literal: However, there was still the Southern Army.
translations.idiomatic: However, there was still the southern army.

context.next: 平陽侯聞之，以呂產謀告丞相平，丞相平乃召朱虛侯佐太尉。
