translations.chinese: 平陽侯聞之，以呂產謀告丞相平，丞相平乃召朱虛侯佐太尉。
translations.literal: Pingyang Hou heard it, with Lü Chan plot informed Chancellor Ping, Chancellor Ping then summoned Zhuxu Hou assist Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Pingyang heard of it and informed Chancellor Ping of Lü Chan's plot. Chancellor Ping then summoned the Marquis of Zhuxu to assist the Grand Commandant.

context.previous: 然尚有南軍。
context.next: 太尉令朱虛侯監軍門。

translations.chinese: 太尉令朱虛侯監軍門。
translations.literal: The Grand Commandant commanded the Marquis of Zhuxu to oversee the army gate.
translations.idiomatic: The commander-in-chief commanded the Marquis of Zhuxu to oversee the army gate.

context.previous: 平陽侯聞之，以呂產謀告丞相平，丞相平乃召朱虛侯佐太尉。
context.next: 令平陽侯告衛尉：「毋入相國產殿門。」

translations.chinese: 令平陽侯告衛尉：「毋入相國產殿門。」
translations.literal: Commanded Pingyang Hou inform Guard Commandant: 'Do not enter Chancellor Chan palace gate.'
translations.idiomatic: He commanded the Marquis of Pingyang to inform the Guard Commandant: 'Do not enter Chancellor Chan's palace gate.'

context.previous: 太尉令朱虛侯監軍門。
context.next: 呂產不知呂祿已去北軍，乃入未央宮，欲為亂，殿門弗得入，裴回往來。

translations.chinese: 呂產不知呂祿已去北軍，乃入未央宮，欲為亂，殿門弗得入，裴回往來。
translations.literal: Lü Chan not knew Lü Lu already left Northern Army, then entered Weiyang Palace, wished make rebellion, palace gate not able enter, paced back forth.
translations.idiomatic: Lü Chan did not know that Lü Lu had already left the Northern Army, so he entered Weiyang Palace wishing to make rebellion. He was not able to enter the palace gate, and paced back and forth.

context.previous: 令平陽侯告衛尉：「毋入相國產殿門。」
context.next: 平陽侯恐弗勝，馳語太尉。

translations.chinese: 平陽侯恐弗勝，馳語太尉。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Pingyang feared they would not win, and galloped to tell the Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Pingyang feared they would not win, and galloped to tell the commander-in-chief.

context.previous: 呂產不知呂祿已去北軍，乃入未央宮，欲為亂，殿門弗得入，裴回往來。
context.next: 太尉尚恐不勝諸呂，未敢訟言誅之，乃遣朱虛侯謂曰：「急入宮衛帝。」

translations.chinese: 太尉尚恐不勝諸呂，未敢訟言誅之，乃遣朱虛侯謂曰：「急入宮衛帝。」
translations.literal: Grand Commandant still feared not defeat various Lü, not dared openly say execute them, then sent Zhuxu Hou told said: 'Urgently enter palace guard emperor.'
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Commandant still feared they could not defeat the various Lü clan, and did not dare to openly say to execute them. He sent the Marquis of Zhuxu and told him: 'Urgently enter the palace to guard the emperor.'

context.previous: 平陽侯恐弗勝，馳語太尉。
context.next: 朱虛侯請卒，太尉予卒千餘人。

translations.chinese: 朱虛侯請卒，太尉予卒千餘人。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Zhuxu requested troops. The Grand Commandant gave him over a thousand troops.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Zhuxu requested troops. The commander-in-chief gave him over a thousand troops.

context.previous: 太尉尚恐不勝諸呂，未敢訟言誅之，乃遣朱虛侯謂曰：「急入宮衛帝。」
context.next: 入未央宮門，遂見產廷中。

translations.chinese: 入未央宮門，遂見產廷中。
translations.literal: He entered the Weiyang Palace gate, then saw Chan in the middle of the courtyard.
translations.idiomatic: He entered the weiyang Palace gate, then saw Chan in the middle of the courtyard.

context.previous: 朱虛侯請卒，太尉予卒千餘人。
context.next: 日餔時，遂擊產。

translations.chinese: 日餔時，遂擊產。
translations.literal: At dusk, they then attacked Chan.
translations.idiomatic: At dusk, they attacked Chan.

context.previous: 入未央宮門，遂見產廷中。
context.next: 產走，天風大起，以故其從官亂，莫敢鬬。

translations.chinese: 產走，天風大起，以故其從官亂，莫敢鬬。
translations.literal: Chan fled, but a great heavenly wind arose, therefore his following officials were in chaos and none dared fight.
translations.idiomatic: Chan fled, but a great heavenly wind arose, therefore his following officials were in chaos and none dared fight.

context.previous: 日餔時，遂擊產。
context.next: 逐產，殺之郎中府吏廁中。

translations.chinese: 逐產，殺之郎中府吏廁中。
translations.literal: They pursued Chan and killed him in the toilet of the Chamberlain for Attendants' residence.
translations.idiomatic: They pursued Chan and killed him in the toilet of the Chamberlain for Attendants' residence.

context.previous: 產走，天風大起，以故其從官亂，莫敢鬬。

translations.chinese: 朱虛侯已殺產，帝命謁者持節勞朱虛侯。
translations.literal: The Marquis of Zhuxu had already killed Chan. The emperor commanded a Palace Attendant to hold the tally and reward the Marquis of Zhuxu.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Zhuxu had already slain Lü Chan.

context.next: 朱虛侯欲奪節信，謁者不肯，朱虛侯則從與載，因節信馳走，斬長樂衛尉呂更始。

translations.chinese: 朱虛侯欲奪節信，謁者不肯，朱虛侯則從與載，因節信馳走，斬長樂衛尉呂更始。
translations.literal: Zhuxu Hou wished seize tally credentials, Palace Attendant not willing, Zhuxu Hou then followed with him rode, by means of tally credentials galloped went, beheaded Changle Guard Commandant Lü Gengshi.
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Zhuxu wished to seize the tally and credentials. The Palace Attendant was not willing. The Marquis of Zhuxu then rode with him, by means of the tally and credentials galloped away, and beheaded the Changle Guard Commandant Lü Gengshi.

context.previous: 朱虛侯已殺產，帝命謁者持節勞朱虛侯。
context.next: 還，馳入北軍，報太尉。

translations.chinese: 還，馳入北軍，報太尉。
translations.literal: He returned and galloped into the Northern Army to report to the Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: He returned and galloped into the northern army to report to the commander-in-chief.

context.previous: 朱虛侯欲奪節信，謁者不肯，朱虛侯則從與載，因節信馳走，斬長樂衛尉呂更始。
context.next: 太尉起，拜賀朱虛侯曰：「所患獨呂產，今已誅，天下定矣。」

translations.chinese: 太尉起，拜賀朱虛侯曰：「所患獨呂產，今已誅，天下定矣。」
translations.literal: Grand Commandant arose, bowed congratulated Zhuxu Hou said: 'What concerned only Lü Chan, now already executed, realm pacified.'
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Commandant arose and bowed to congratulate the Marquis of Zhuxu saying: 'What we were concerned about was only Lü Chan. Now he has already been executed and the realm is pacified.'

context.previous: 還，馳入北軍，報太尉。
context.next: 遂遣人分部悉捕諸呂男女，無少長皆斬之。

translations.chinese: 遂遣人分部悉捕諸呂男女，無少長皆斬之。
translations.literal: Then dispatched people divided divisions completely captured various Lü males females, without young old all beheaded them.
translations.idiomatic: He dispatched people in divided divisions to completely capture all the males and females of the various Lü clan, and beheaded them all without regard for age.

context.previous: 太尉起，拜賀朱虛侯曰：「所患獨呂產，今已誅，天下定矣。」
context.next: 辛酉，捕斬呂祿，而笞殺呂媭。

translations.chinese: 辛酉，捕斬呂祿，而笞殺呂媭。
translations.literal: Xinwei day, captured beheaded Lü Lu, and whipped killed Lü Xu.
translations.idiomatic: On the xinwei day, they captured and beheaded Lü Lu, and whipped Lü Xu to death.

context.previous: 遂遣人分部悉捕諸呂男女，無少長皆斬之。
context.next: 使人誅燕王呂通，而廢魯王偃。

translations.chinese: 使人誅燕王呂通，而廢魯王偃。
translations.literal: Sent person executed Yan King Lü Tong, yet deposed Lu King Yan.
translations.idiomatic: He sent someone to execute the the King of Yan, Lü Tong, and deposed the the King of Lu, Yan.

context.previous: 辛酉，捕斬呂祿，而笞殺呂媭。
context.next: 壬戌，以帝太傅食其復為左丞相。

translations.chinese: 壬戌，以帝太傅食其復為左丞相。
translations.literal: On the renxu day, the emperor's Grand Tutor Shi Yi again became Left Chancellor.
translations.idiomatic: On the renxu day, the emperor's Grand Tutor Shi Yi again became Left Chancellor.

context.previous: 使人誅燕王呂通，而廢魯王偃。
context.next: 戊辰，徙濟川王王梁，立趙幽王子遂為趙王。

translations.chinese: 戊辰，徙濟川王王梁，立趙幽王子遂為趙王。
translations.literal: On the wuchen day, they moved the King of Jichuan to be enfeoffed in Liang, and established King You of Zhao's son Sui as King of Zhao.
translations.idiomatic: On the wuchen day, they moved the the King of Jichuan to rule Liang and established King You of Zhao's son Sui as the King of Zhao.

context.previous: 壬戌，以帝太傅食其復為左丞相。
context.next: 遣朱虛侯章以誅諸呂氏事告齊王，令罷兵。

translations.chinese: 遣朱虛侯章以誅諸呂氏事告齊王，令罷兵。
translations.literal: Dispatched Zhuxu Hou Zhang with executed various Lü clan matters informed Qi King, commanded cease troops.
translations.idiomatic: He dispatched the Marquis of Zhuxu, Zhang, to inform the the King of Qi of the matters of executing the various Lü clan, and commanded to cease troops.

context.previous: 戊辰，徙濟川王王梁，立趙幽王子遂為趙王。
context.next: 灌嬰兵亦罷滎陽而歸。

translations.chinese: 灌嬰兵亦罷滎陽而歸。
translations.literal: Guan Ying's troops were also dismissed from Xingyang and returned.
translations.idiomatic: Guan Ying's forces were also discharged from Xingyang and returned home.

context.previous: 遣朱虛侯章以誅諸呂氏事告齊王，令罷兵。

translations.chinese: 諸大臣相與陰謀曰：「少帝及梁、淮陽、常山王，皆非真孝惠子也。
translations.literal: Various ministers mutually secretly plotted said: 'Young emperor and Liang, Huaiyang, Changshan kings, all not true Filial Hui sons also.
translations.idiomatic: The various ministers secretly plotted among themselves saying: 'The young emperor and the kings of Liang, Huaiyang, and Changshan are all not true sons of Emperor Xiaohui.

context.next: 呂后以計詐名他人子，殺其母，養後宮，令孝惠子之，立以為後，及諸王，以彊呂氏。

translations.chinese: 呂后以計詐名他人子，殺其母，養後宮，令孝惠子之，立以為後，及諸王，以彊呂氏。
translations.literal: Lü Empress Dowager with stratagem falsely named other people sons, killed their mothers, raised rear palace, made Filial Hui beget them, established as empress and various kings, to strengthen Lü clan.
translations.idiomatic: Empress Dowager Lü used stratagems to falsely name other people's sons, killed their mothers, raised them in the rear palace, had Emperor Xiaohui beget them, and established them as empress and various kings to strengthen the Lü clan.

context.previous: 諸大臣相與陰謀曰：「少帝及梁、淮陽、常山王，皆非真孝惠子也。
context.next: 今皆已夷滅諸呂，而置所立，即長用事，吾屬無類矣。

translations.chinese: 今皆已夷滅諸呂，而置所立，即長用事，吾屬無類矣。
translations.literal: Now all already exterminated various Lü, yet establish what established, then grow use affairs, we group no kind remain.
translations.idiomatic: Now we have all exterminated the various Lü clan, but if we establish what was established, then when they grow up and handle affairs, our group will have no kind remaining.

context.previous: 呂后以計詐名他人子，殺其母，養後宮，令孝惠子之，立以為後，及諸王，以彊呂氏。
context.next: 不如視諸王最賢者立之。」

translations.chinese: 不如視諸王最賢者立之。」
translations.literal: Not as good as examine various kings most worthy establish him.'
translations.idiomatic: It would be better to examine the various kings and establish the most worthy one.'

context.previous: 今皆已夷滅諸呂，而置所立，即長用事，吾屬無類矣。
context.next: 或言「齊悼惠王高帝長子，今其適子為齊王，推本言之，高帝適長孫，可立也」。

translations.chinese: 或言「齊悼惠王高帝長子，今其適子為齊王，推本言之，高帝適長孫，可立也」。
translations.literal: Some said 'Qi Dao Hui King Gao emperor eldest son, now his proper son is Qi King, tracing root speak, Gao emperor proper eldest grandson, can establish also'.
translations.idiomatic: Some said: 'The the King of Qi Dao Hui was Emperor Gao's eldest son. Now his proper son is the King of Qi. Tracing back to the root, Emperor Gao's proper eldest grandson can be established.'

context.previous: 不如視諸王最賢者立之。」
context.next: 大臣皆曰：「呂氏以外家惡而幾危宗廟，亂功臣今齊王母家駟（鈞），駟鈞，惡人也。

translations.chinese: 大臣皆曰：「呂氏以外家惡而幾危宗廟，亂功臣今齊王母家駟（鈞），駟鈞，惡人也。
translations.literal: Ministers all said: 'Lü clan with outer family evil nearly endangered ancestral temple, confused meritorious officials now Qi King mother family Si (Jun), Si Jun, evil person also.
translations.idiomatic: All the ministers said: 'The Lü clan with their evil outer family nearly endangered the ancestral temple and confused the meritorious officials. Now the the King of Qi's mother's family is the Si clan (Jun). The Si Jun are evil people.

context.previous: 或言「齊悼惠王高帝長子，今其適子為齊王，推本言之，高帝適長孫，可立也」。
context.next: 即立齊王，則復為呂氏。」

translations.chinese: 即立齊王，則復為呂氏。」
translations.literal: If establish Qi King, then again become Lü clan.'
translations.idiomatic: If we establish the the King of Qi, then it will again become the Lü clan.'

context.previous: 大臣皆曰：「呂氏以外家惡而幾危宗廟，亂功臣今齊王母家駟（鈞），駟鈞，惡人也。
context.next: 欲立淮南王，以為少，母家又惡。

translations.chinese: 欲立淮南王，以為少，母家又惡。
translations.literal: Wished establish Huainan King, considered young, mother's family moreover evil.
translations.idiomatic: They wished to establish the the King of Huainan, but considered him young, and his mother's family was moreover evil.

context.previous: 即立齊王，則復為呂氏。」
context.next: 乃曰：「代王方今高帝見子，最長，仁孝寬厚。

translations.chinese: 乃曰：「代王方今高帝見子，最長，仁孝寬厚。
translations.literal: Then said: 'Dai King now Emperor Gao surviving son, eldest, benevolent filial broad thick.
translations.idiomatic: They said: 'The the King of Dai is now Emperor Gao's surviving son, the eldest, benevolent, filial, broad, and thick.'

context.previous: 欲立淮南王，以為少，母家又惡。
context.next: 太后家薄氏謹良。

translations.chinese: 太后家薄氏謹良。
translations.literal: The Empress Dowager's family, the Bo clan, is careful and good.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager's family, the Bo clan, was careful and virtuous.

context.previous: 乃曰：「代王方今高帝見子，最長，仁孝寬厚。
context.next: 且立長故順，以仁孝聞於天下，便。」

translations.chinese: 且立長故順，以仁孝聞於天下，便。」
translations.literal: Moreover establish eldest therefore proper, with benevolent filial heard in realm, convenient.'
translations.idiomatic: Moreover, establishing the eldest is therefore proper, and he is known throughout the realm for benevolence and filial piety - convenient.'

context.previous: 太后家薄氏謹良。
context.next: 乃相與共陰使人召代王。

translations.chinese: 乃相與共陰使人召代王。
translations.literal: They then together secretly sent someone to summon the King of Dai.
translations.idiomatic: They jointly dispatched a secret envoy to summon the the King of Dai.

context.previous: 且立長故順，以仁孝聞於天下，便。」
context.next: 代王使人辭謝。

translations.chinese: 代王使人辭謝。
translations.literal: The King of Dai sent someone to decline and thank them.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Dai sent someone to politely decline.

context.previous: 乃相與共陰使人召代王。
context.next: 再反，然後乘六乘傳。

translations.chinese: 再反，然後乘六乘傳。
translations.literal: He returned twice, then rode with six teams in relay.
translations.idiomatic: After returning twice, he traveled with six relay teams.

context.previous: 代王使人辭謝。
context.next: 後九月晦日己酉，至長安，舍代邸。

translations.chinese: 後九月晦日己酉，至長安，舍代邸。
translations.literal: Later ninth month last day jiyou, arrived Chang'an, resided Dai residence.
translations.idiomatic: Later, on the jiyou day, the last day of the ninth month, he arrived at Chang'an and resided in the Dai residence.

context.previous: 再反，然後乘六乘傳。
context.next: 大臣皆往謁，奉天子璽上代王，共尊立為天子。

translations.chinese: 大臣皆往謁，奉天子璽上代王，共尊立為天子。
translations.literal: All the ministers went to audience and presented the Son of Heaven's seal to offer to the King of Dai. Together they honored and established him as Son of Heaven.
translations.idiomatic: All ministers went to pay homage and presented the imperial seal to the the King of Dai. Together they enthroned him as emperor.

context.previous: 後九月晦日己酉，至長安，舍代邸。
context.next: 代王數讓，群臣固請，然後聽。

translations.chinese: 代王數讓，群臣固請，然後聽。
translations.literal: The King of Dai declined several times. The ministers firmly requested, then he listened.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Dai declined repeatedly, but the ministers insisted, and he finally consented.

context.previous: 大臣皆往謁，奉天子璽上代王，共尊立為天子。

translations.chinese: 東牟侯興居曰：「誅呂氏吾無功，請得除宮。」
translations.literal: Dongmu Hou Xingju said: 'Execute Lü clan I have no merit, please able clean palace.'
translations.idiomatic: The Marquis of Dongmu, Xingju, said: 'In executing the Lü clan I have no merit. Please allow me to clean the palace.'

context.next: 乃與太仆汝陰侯滕公入宮，前謂少帝曰：「足下非劉氏，不當立。」

translations.chinese: 乃與太仆汝陰侯滕公入宮，前謂少帝曰：「足下非劉氏，不當立。」
translations.literal: Then with Grand Coachman Ruyin Hou Teng Gong entered palace, in front told young emperor said: 'Your excellency not Liu clan, should not establish.'
translations.idiomatic: He entered the palace with the Grand Coachman, Marquis of Ruyin, Teng Gong, and in front told the young emperor: 'Your excellency is not of the Liu clan and should not be established.'

context.previous: 東牟侯興居曰：「誅呂氏吾無功，請得除宮。」
context.next: 乃顧麾左右執戟者掊兵罷去。

translations.chinese: 乃顧麾左右執戟者掊兵罷去。
translations.literal: He then turned and waved to the left and right halberd holders to throw down their weapons and be dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: He turned and signaled to the guards on left and right to lay down their weapons and disperse.

context.previous: 乃與太仆汝陰侯滕公入宮，前謂少帝曰：「足下非劉氏，不當立。」
context.next: 有數人不肯去兵，宦者令張澤諭告，亦去兵。

translations.chinese: 有數人不肯去兵，宦者令張澤諭告，亦去兵。
translations.literal: There were several people who were not willing to leave their troops. The eunuch commanded Zhang Ze to explain and tell them, and they also left their troops.
translations.idiomatic: Several men refused to disarm. The eunuch ordered Zhang Ze to persuade them, and they too laid down their arms.

context.previous: 乃顧麾左右執戟者掊兵罷去。
context.next: 滕公乃召乘輿車載少帝出。

translations.chinese: 滕公乃召乘輿車載少帝出。
translations.literal: Teng Gong then summoned the imperial carriage to load the young emperor and go out.
translations.idiomatic: Teng Gong summoned the imperial chariot to carry the young emperor out.

context.previous: 有數人不肯去兵，宦者令張澤諭告，亦去兵。
context.next: 少帝曰：「欲將我安之乎？」

translations.chinese: 少帝曰：「欲將我安之乎？」
translations.literal: Young emperor said: 'Wish take me where put?'
translations.idiomatic: The young emperor said: 'Where do you wish to take me and put me?'

context.previous: 滕公乃召乘輿車載少帝出。
context.next: 滕公曰「出就舍。」

translations.chinese: 滕公曰「出就舍。」
translations.literal: Teng Gong said 'Go out to residence.'
translations.idiomatic: Teng Gong said: 'Go out to the residence.'

context.previous: 少帝曰：「欲將我安之乎？」
context.next: 舍少府。

translations.chinese: 舍少府。
translations.literal: He resided at the Lesser Treasury.
translations.idiomatic: He took residence at the Lesser Treasury.

context.previous: 滕公曰「出就舍。」
context.next: 乃奉天子法駕，迎代王於邸。

translations.chinese: 乃奉天子法駕，迎代王於邸。
translations.literal: They then presented the Son of Heaven's ceremonial carriage and welcomed the King of Dai at his residence.
translations.idiomatic: They brought forth the emperor's ceremonial carriage to welcome the the King of Dai at his residence.

context.previous: 舍少府。
context.next: 報曰：「宮謹除。」

translations.chinese: 報曰：「宮謹除。」
translations.literal: Reported said: 'Palace carefully cleared.'
translations.idiomatic: He reported: 'The palace has been carefully cleared.'

context.previous: 乃奉天子法駕，迎代王於邸。
context.next: 代王即夕入未央宮。

translations.chinese: 代王即夕入未央宮。
translations.literal: The King of Dai then entered Weiyang Palace that evening.
translations.idiomatic: That evening, the the King of Dai entered Weiyang Palace.

context.previous: 報曰：「宮謹除。」
context.next: 有謁者十人持戟衛端門，曰：「天子在也，足下何為者而入？」

translations.chinese: 有謁者十人持戟衛端門，曰：「天子在也，足下何為者而入？」
translations.literal: Had Palace Attendants ten people held halberds guarded main gate, said: 'Son of Heaven here also, your excellency what doer enter?'
translations.idiomatic: Had Palace Attendants ten people held halberds guarded main gate, said: 'Emperor here also, your excellency what doer enter?'

context.previous: 代王即夕入未央宮。
context.next: 代王乃謂太尉。

translations.chinese: 代王乃謂太尉。
translations.literal: The King of Dai then told the Grand Commandant.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Dai then spoke to the commander-in-chief.

context.previous: 有謁者十人持戟衛端門，曰：「天子在也，足下何為者而入？」
context.next: 太尉往諭，謁者十人皆掊兵而去。

translations.chinese: 太尉往諭，謁者十人皆掊兵而去。
translations.literal: The Grand Commandant went and explained. The ten Palace Attendants all threw down their weapons and went away.
translations.idiomatic: The commander-in-chief went to explain, and all ten palace attendants laid down their weapons and departed.

context.previous: 代王乃謂太尉。
context.next: 代王遂入而聽政。

translations.chinese: 代王遂入而聽政。
translations.literal: The King of Dai then entered and took charge of government affairs.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Dai then entered the palace and began governing.

context.previous: 太尉往諭，謁者十人皆掊兵而去。
context.next: 夜，有司分部誅滅梁、淮陽、常山王及少帝於邸。

translations.chinese: 夜，有司分部誅滅梁、淮陽、常山王及少帝於邸。
translations.literal: At night, officials in divided divisions executed and exterminated the kings of Liang, Huaiyang, and Changshan, and the young emperor at their residence.
translations.idiomatic: That night, officials in detachments executed the kings of Liang, Huaiyang, and Changshan, along with the young emperor, at their residences.

context.previous: 代王遂入而聽政。
context.next: 代王立為天子。

translations.chinese: 代王立為天子。
translations.literal: The King of Dai was established as Son of Heaven.
translations.idiomatic: The the King of Dai was enthroned as emperor.

context.previous: 夜，有司分部誅滅梁、淮陽、常山王及少帝於邸。
context.next: 二十三年崩，謚為孝文皇帝。

translations.chinese: 二十三年崩，謚為孝文皇帝。
translations.literal: He collapsed in the twenty-third year, and was given the posthumous name of Emperor Xiaowen.
translations.idiomatic: He died in the twenty-third year and received the posthumous title of Emperor Xiaowen.

context.previous: 代王立為天子。

translations.chinese: 太史公曰：孝惠皇帝、高后之時，黎民得離戰國之苦，君臣俱欲休息乎無為，故惠帝垂拱，高后女主稱制，政不出房戶，天下晏然。
translations.literal: Grand Historian said: Filial Hui emperor, Empress Gao time, common people able leave Warring States bitterness, ruler ministers all wished rest at non-action, therefore Hui emperor hung sleeves, Empress Gao female ruler named system, government not out chamber doors, realm peaceful calm.
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Historian said: In the time of Emperor Xiaohui and Empress Gao, the common people were able to leave the bitterness of the Warring States period. Ruler and ministers all wished to rest in non-action. Therefore Emperor Hui hung his sleeves, Empress Gao as female ruler named the system, and government did not go out of the chamber doors. The realm was peaceful and calm.

context.next: 刑罰罕用，罪人是希。

translations.chinese: 刑罰罕用，罪人是希。
translations.literal: Punishments were rarely used, and criminal people were rare.
translations.idiomatic: Punishments were seldom applied, and criminals were scarce.

context.previous: 太史公曰：孝惠皇帝、高后之時，黎民得離戰國之苦，君臣俱欲休息乎無為，故惠帝垂拱，高后女主稱制，政不出房戶，天下晏然。
context.next: 民務稼穡，衣食滋殖。

translations.chinese: 民務稼穡，衣食滋殖。
translations.literal: The people were devoted to farming and harvesting, and their clothing and food increased and grew.
translations.idiomatic: The people devoted themselves to agriculture, and their clothing and food multiplied.

context.previous: 刑罰罕用，罪人是希。
